title: "Gradient Forest Combined-BayPass-LFMM2"
output: html_document
date: "2022-11-29"

```{r Combine cumulative importance dfs and plot} 

setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/Combined")

library(gradientForest)
library(dplyr)
library(calibrate)
library(ggplot2)
library(raster)
#library(rgdal)
library(sf)
library(reshape2)
library(tmap)
library(basicPlotteR)
library(tmaptools)
library(vegan)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(colorspace)
library(shadowtext)
library(forcats)
library(terra)
library(tidyterra)  
library(tidyterra)
library(ggrepel)


#load GF cumulative importance dfs for each species 
#Adaptive (seven env)----
ban.cand.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/BM/bm.cand.preds.df.RData") 
cal.cand.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/CR/cr.cand.preds.df.RData") 
epa.cand.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EI/ei.cand.preds.df.RData") 
euc.cand.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EO/eo.cand.preds.df.RData") 
gre.cand.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/GA/ga.cand.preds.df.RData") 
xan.cand.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/XA/xa.cand.preds.df.RData") 

#Adaptive (four env)----
ban.cand.preds.vif <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/BM/vif/bm.cand.preds.df.vif.RData") 
cal.cand.preds.vif <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/CR/vif/cr.cand.preds.df.vif.RData") 
epa.cand.preds.vif <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EI/vif/ei.cand.preds.df.vif.RData") 
euc.cand.preds.vif <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EO/vif/eo.cand.preds.df.vif.RData") 
gre.cand.preds.vif <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/GA/vif/ga.cand.preds.df.vif.RData") 
xan.cand.preds.vif <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/XA/vif/xa.cand.preds.df.vif.RData") 

all.cand.preds.vif <- rbind(bm.cand.preds.vif.df, cr.cand.preds.vif.df, ei.cand.preds.vif.df, 
                            eo.cand.preds.vif.df, ga.cand.preds.vif.df, xa.cand.preds.vif.df) %>%
  mutate(x = as.numeric(x))

y.max <- max(all.cand.preds.vif$y)

coluors <- c("#CC79A7","#43BA8F","#7DCCFF",
             "#F09163","#97CE2F","#B7B7B7")



all.cand.preds.vif$pred <- factor(all.cand.preds.vif$pred, levels = c("TWI", "AVP", "pHc","BIO05"))

colnames <- c(TWI = "TWI",
              AVP = "SAP (mg/kg)",
              pHc = "SpH",
              BIO05 = "TMAX (°C)")

all.cand.preds.vif %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=snps, linetype = snps), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  facet_wrap(~ pred, scales = "free_x", labeller = as_labeller(colnames)) + 
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "snps", 
                        values = c(bm.cand.vif = "solid", cr.cand.vif = "solid", 
                                   ei.cand.vif = "solid", eo.cand.vif = "solid", 
                                   ga.cand.vif = "solid", xa.cand.vif = "solid")) +
  ylab("Cumulative Importance") +
  xlab("Predictor value") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(#legend.position = "none", 
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                               vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=13,face="plain"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank())   

save.image(file="GF_CI_spp_v4.vif.RData")

ggsave("GF_CI_spp_v4.vif.pdf", width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("GF_CI_spp_v4.vif.svg", width = 8 , height = 7, bg = "white")  

#Neutral----
ban.neu.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/BM/neutral/bm.neu.preds.df.RData") 
cal.neu.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/CR/neutral/cr.neu.preds.df.RData") 
epa.neu.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EI/neutral/ei.neu.preds.df.RData") 
euc.neu.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EO/neutral/eo.neu.preds.df.RData") 
gre.neu.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/GA/neutral/ga.neu.preds.df.RData") 
xan.neu.preds <- load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/XA/neutral/xa.neu.preds.df.RData") 

##Neutral and Candidates----
all.neu.cand.preds <- rbind(bm.cand.preds.df, cr.cand.preds.df, ei.cand.preds.df, 
                        eo.cand.preds.df, ga.cand.preds.df, xa.cand.preds.df,
                        bm.neu.preds.df, cr.neu.preds.df, ei.neu.preds.df, 
                        eo.neu.preds.df, ga.neu.preds.df, xa.neu.preds.df) %>%
  mutate(x = as.numeric(x))
coluors <- c("#F18F01","#F18F01","#048BA8","#048BA8","#9B7F84","#9B7F84",
             "#99C24D","#99C24D","#2F2D2E","#2F2D2E","#EC3E44","#EC3E44")

y.max <- max(all.neu.cand.preds$y)

##AVP----
avp.p.imp <- all.neu.cand.preds %>%
  filter(pred == "AVP") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=snps, linetype = snps), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  #facet_wrap(~ pred) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "snps", 
                        values = c(bm.cand = "solid", cr.cand = "solid", 
                                   ei.cand = "solid", eo.cand = "solid", 
                                   ga.cand = "solid", xa.cand = "solid",
                                   bm.neu = "dotted", cr.neu = "dotted", 
                                   ei.neu = "dotted", eo.neu = "dotted", 
                                   ga.neu = "dotted", xa.neu = "dotted")) +
  ylab("Cumulative Importance") +
  xlab("AVP = Available Phosphorus") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.title=element_text(size=18, face="plain"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=18),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain")) 
ggsave(plot = avp.p.imp, filename = "AVP_turnover_snps_spp_C_N.png", width = 7, height = 7)

                        eo.cand.preds.df, ga.cand.preds.df, xa.cand.preds.df) %>%
mutate(x = as.numeric(x))

coluors <- c("#CC79A7","#43BA8F","#7DCCFF",
             "#F09163","#97CE2F","#B7B7B7")


y.max <- max(all.cand.preds$y)

        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=18),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain")) 

ggsave("BIO12_turnover_snps_spp.pdf", width = 7 , height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("BIO12_turnover_snps_spp.svg", width = 7 , height = 7, bg = "white")  


##BIO14----
b14.p.imp <- all.cand.preds %>%
  filter(pred == "BIO14") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=snps, linetype = snps), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  #facet_wrap(~ pred) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "snps", 
                        values = c(bm.cand = "solid", cr.cand = "solid", 
                                   ei.cand = "solid", eo.cand = "solid", 
                                   ga.cand = "solid", xa.cand = "solid")) +
  ylab("Cumulative Importance") +
  xlab("BIO14 = Precipitation of Driest Month") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.title=element_text(size=18, face="plain"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=18),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain")) 

ggsave("BIO14_turnover_snps_spp.pdf", width = 7 , height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("BIO14_turnover_snps_spp.svg", width = 7 , height = 7, bg = "white")  

##pHc----
pHc.p.imp <- all.cand.preds %>%
  filter(pred == "pHc") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=snps, linetype = snps), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  #facet_wrap(~ pred) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "snps", 
                        values = c(bm.cand = "solid", cr.cand = "solid", 
                                   ei.cand = "solid", eo.cand = "solid", 
                                   ga.cand = "solid", xa.cand = "solid")) +
  ylab("Cumulative Importance") +
  xlab("pHc = pH - CaCl2") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
 theme_classic()+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.title=element_text(size=18, face="plain"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=18),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),

ggsave("pHc_turnover_snps_spp.pdf", width = 7 , height = 7, dpi = 300)

##TWI----
TWI.p.imp <- all.cand.preds %>%
  filter(pred == "TWI") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=snps, linetype = snps), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  #facet_wrap(~ pred) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "snps", 
                        values = c(bm.cand = "solid", cr.cand = "solid", 
                                   ei.cand = "solid", eo.cand = "solid", 
                                   ga.cand = "solid", xa.cand = "solid")) +
  ylab("Cumulative Importance") +
  xlab("TWI = Topographic Wetness Index") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
 theme_classic()+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.title=element_text(size=18, face="plain"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=18),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain")) 

ggsave("TWI_turnover_snps_spp.pdf", width = 7 , height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("TWI_turnover_snps_spp.svg", width = 7 , height = 7, bg = "white")  

#Put them together----


# Wrap_plots----
wrap_plots(TWI.p.imp, avp.p.imp, pHc.p.imp, 
                            b1.p.imp, b5.p.imp, b12.p.imp, b14.p.imp,
                            nrow = 4, 
                            ncol = 2,
                            heights = c(2, 2), # the more rows in the lower part, the longer it should be
                            widths = c(2, 2),
                            guides = "collect") &
plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c('(a)','(b)','(c)','(d)','(e)','(f)','(g)'))) & 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.4,0.4,0.4,0.4), "cm"), legend.pos = "none", plot.tag.position = c(.05, 1.03),
        plot.tag = element_text(size = 9.5, hjust = 0, vjust = 0,face = 'bold')) 

ggsave("Turnover_snps_spp.pdf", width = 8 , height = 16, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Turnover_snps_spp.svg", width = 8 , height = 16, bg = "white") 

#Facet_wraps----
coluors <- c("#CC79A7","#43BA8F","#7DCCFF",
             "#F09163","#97CE2F","#B7B7B7")


all.cand.preds$pred <- factor(all.cand.preds$pred, levels = c("TWI", "AVP", "pHc","BIO01", "BIO05", "BIO12","BIO14"))

colnames <- c(TWI = "TWI",
              AVP = "SAP (mg/kg)",
              pHc = "SpH",
              BIO01 = "TMA (°C)",
              BIO05 = "TMAX (°C)",
              BIO12 = "PMA (mm)",
              BIO14 = "PMIN (mm)")

all.cand.preds %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=snps, linetype = snps), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  facet_wrap(~ pred, scales = "free_x", labeller = as_labeller(colnames)) + 
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "snps", 
                        values = c(bm.cand = "solid", cr.cand = "solid", 
                                   ei.cand = "solid", eo.cand = "solid", 
                                   ga.cand = "solid", xa.cand = "solid")) +
  ylab("Cumulative Importance") +
  xlab("Predictor value") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(#legend.position = "none", 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black",angle = 0, 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size=13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=13,face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())   

save.image(file="GF_CI_spp_v4.RData")

ggsave("GF_CI_spp_v4.pdf")
ggsave("GF_CI_spp_v4.svg", width = 7 , height = 7, bg = "white")  
```

```{r Combine Splits density plot}
#AVP
bm.dens.AVP.df <- data.frame(Variable = "AVP",
                             Species = "BM",
                             x = ban.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$x,
                             y = ban.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$y)
ggplot(bm.dens.AVP.df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_line()
cr.dens.AVP.df <- data.frame(Variable = "AVP",
                             Species = "CR",
                             x = cal.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$x,
                             y = cal.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$y)
ei.dens.AVP.df <- data.frame(Variable = "AVP",
                             Species = "EI",
                             x = epa.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$x,
                             y = epa.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$y)
eo.dens.AVP.df <- data.frame(Variable = "AVP",
                             Species = "EO",
                             x = euc.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$x,
                             y = euc.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$y)
ga.dens.AVP.df <- data.frame(Variable = "AVP",
                             Species = "GA",
                             x = gre.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$x,
                             y = gre.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$y)
xa.dens.AVP.df <- data.frame(Variable = "AVP",
                             Species = "XA",
                             x = xan.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$x,
                             y = xan.BP.lfmm.GF$dens$AVP$y)

AVP.dens.sp <- rbind(bm.dens.AVP.df, cr.dens.AVP.df, ei.dens.AVP.df,
                     eo.dens.AVP.df, ga.dens.AVP.df, xa.dens.AVP.df) %>%
  mutate(x = as.numeric(x))
coluors <- c("#F18F01", "#048BA8","#9B7F84","#99C24D", "#2F2D2E","#EC3E44")
y.max <- max(AVP.dens.sp $y)
avp.p.imp <- AVP.dens.sp  %>%
  filter(Variable == "AVP") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=Species), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  #facet_wrap(~ Variable) +
  ylab("Density") +
  xlab("AVP = Available Phosphorus") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
  theme_classic() 
ggsave(plot = avp.p.imp, filename = "AVP_splitdensity_plot_BP_lfmm.png", width = 6, height = 6)

                     eo.dens.TWI.df, ga.dens.TWI.df, xa.dens.TWI.df) %>%
  mutate(x = as.numeric(x))
y.max <- max(TWI.dens.sp $y)
TWI.p.imp <- TWI.dens.sp  %>%
  filter(Variable == "TWI") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_step(aes(x=x,y=y,color=Species), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coluors) +
  #facet_wrap(~ Variable) +
  ylab("Density") +
  xlab("TWI = Topographic Wetness Index") +
  ylim(c(0,y.max))+
  theme_classic() 
ggsave(plot = TWI.p.imp, filename = "TWI_splitdensity_plot_BP_lfmm.png.png", width = 6, height = 6)
```

```{r Table 1 - Summary of the datasets }

BM.perf <- importance(ban.BP.lfmm.GF, type="Species")
BM.perf.df <- as.data.frame(BM.perf)

CR.perf <- importance(cal.BP.lfmm.GF, type="Species")
CR.perf.df <- as.data.frame(CR.perf)

EI.perf <- importance(epa.BP.lfmm.GF, type="Species")
EI.perf.df <- as.data.frame(EI.perf)

EO.perf <- importance(euc.BP.lfmm.GF, type="Species")
EO.perf.df <- as.data.frame(EO.perf)

GA.perf <- importance(gre.BP.lfmm.GF, type="Species")
GA.perf.df <- as.data.frame(GA.perf)

XA.perf <- importance(xan.BP.lfmm.GF, type="Species")
XA.perf.df <- as.data.frame(XA.perf)

##mean and range
summary(BM.perf)
#   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
#0.02228 0.04142 0.08974 0.12016 0.16202 0.36612 

summary(CR.perf)
#    Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
#0.001101 0.055432 0.143038 0.164956 0.233430 0.618383 

summary(EI.perf)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0009019 0.0812850 0.1624942 0.2114531 0.3166344 0.7544397 

summary(EO.perf)
#    Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
#0.008854 0.078574 0.172914 0.201055 0.273908 0.761891 

summary(GA.perf)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0005861 0.0487868 0.1171457 0.1485213 0.2128334 0.6712913 

summary(XA.perf)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0003942 0.0663607 0.1317860 0.1587641 0.2279380 0.5374534 

##count the number of loci above R2 of x (here 0.5)
length(BM.perf.df[which(BM.perf.df$BM.perf>0.5),]) #0
length(CR.perf.df[which(CR.perf.df$CR.perf>0.5),]) #2
length(EI.perf.df[which(EI.perf.df$EI.perf>0.5),]) #9
length(EO.perf.df[which(EO.perf.df$EO.perf>0.5),]) #6
length(GA.perf.df[which(GA.perf.df$GA.perf>0.5),]) #5
length(XA.perf.df[which(XA.perf.df$XA.perf>0.5),]) #1

#variable in more than 5 pops: this will be the number of loci run in the final model. Can be seen with: 
gf.NEUTRAL.model.SEtemp
gf.Fst.model.SEtemp
gf.ENVcandidates.model.SEtemp

#How many loci were originally included?


##And we can plot the frequency of R2 for each dataset: 
par(mfrow=c(2,3))
hist(BM.perf)
hist(CR.perf)
hist(EI.perf)
hist(EO.perf)
hist(GA.perf)
hist(XA.perf) 
```

```{r Heatmap - Relative importance }
#Plot Neutral & Candidates----

pal7 <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9,"RdYlBu"))(100)

my.lines<-data.frame(x=c(1.5,2.5), y=c(7.5,.5), 
    xend=c(1.5,2.5), yend=c(7.5,7.5))

my.lines.2<-data.frame(x=c(1.5,4.5), y=c(7.5,.5), 
    xend=c(1.5,4.5), yend=c(7.5,7.5))

my.lines.3<-data.frame(x=c(1.5,6.5), y=c(7.5,.5), 
    xend=c(1.5,6.5), yend=c(7.5,7.5))

my.lines.4<-data.frame(x=c(1.5,8.5), y=c(7.5,.5), 
    xend=c(1.5,8.5), yend=c(7.5,7.5))

my.lines.5<-data.frame(x=c(1.5,10.5), y=c(7.5,.5), 
    xend=c(1.5,10.5), yend=c(7.5,7.5))

ggplot(R.sq.all.melt, aes(x=Var2, y = Var1, fill=value)) +
  coord_equal() +
  ylab('Climatic variable') + xlab('Species') +
  geom_tile(colour="grey30", size=0.005) + 
  #geom_text(aes(label=value), size=3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = rev(pal7)) +
  theme_test() +
 theme(legend.position="bottom", legend.box = "horizontal",
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black", size=18, angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain"), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour="black", size=18, face="plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour="black",size=18,face="plain")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = expression(paste(italic("R"^"2")," weighted importance")),
                               label.position = "bottom",
                               title.position = "left", title.vjust = 0.8,
                               frame.colour = "black",
                               barwidth = 10,
                               barheight = 1.5,
                               ticks.colour = "grey30")) +
  geom_segment(data=my.lines, aes(x,y,xend=xend, yend=yend), size=0.5, colour = "black", inherit.aes=F) +
  geom_segment(data=my.lines.2, aes(x,y,xend=xend, yend=yend), size=0.5, colour = "black", inherit.aes=F) +
  geom_segment(data=my.lines.3, aes(x,y,xend=xend, yend=yend), size=0.5, colour = "black", inherit.aes=F) +
  geom_segment(data=my.lines.4, aes(x,y,xend=xend, yend=yend), size=0.5, colour = "black", inherit.aes=F) +
  geom_segment(data=my.lines.5, aes(x,y,xend=xend, yend=yend), size=0.5, colour = "black", inherit.aes=F) 

ggsave("Heatmap.GF.R2.C.N.spp.pdf", width = 9, height = 8, dpi = 300)

                               frame.colour = "black",
```

```{r Plotting combined cumulative importance}

f12_BP_LF <- combinedGradientForest(Banksia=ban.BP.lfmm.GF, Callitris=cal.BP.lfmm.GF, Epacris=epa.BP.lfmm.GF, Eucalyptus=euc.BP.lfmm.GF, Grevillea=gre.BP.lfmm.GF, Xanthorrhoea=xan.BP.lfmm.GF)

png("Combined_cumulative_importance_BP_LF_plot.png", width=1500, height=1200, res=200)
plot(f12_BP_LF,plot.type="Cumulative.Importance") # R2 total, how well is environment explaining change in AF
dev.off()

png("Combined_predictor_ranges_BP_LF_plot.png", width=1500, height=1200, res=200)
plot(f12_BP_LF,plot.type="Predictor.Ranges") #predicts where the species range is based on adaptive alleles
dev.off()

save(f12_BP_LF, file = "f12_GF_BP_LF.RData")
```

```{r  Load raster stack to generate prediction}

#Seven correlated environmental predictors -----
load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Env.stack.2.RData")

#First check names of raster stack
names(Env.stack.2) #Raster names are not the same as f12_BP_Lf, lets change it!
#"TWI"   "AVP"   "pHc"   "BIO01" "BIO05" "BIO12" "BIO14"

#Plot raster layers
plot(Env.stack.2)

Env.stack.2.grid <- data.frame(TWI = values(Env.stack.2[["TWI"]]), 
                       AVP = values(Env.stack.2[["AVP"]]), 
                       pHc = values(Env.stack.2[["pHc"]]), 
                       BIO01 = values(Env.stack.2[["BIO01"]]),
                       BIO05 = values(Env.stack.2[["BIO05"]]),
                       BIO12 = values(Env.stack.2[["BIO12"]]),
                       BIO14 = values(Env.stack.2[["BIO14"]]))

plot(Env.stack.2[[1]], colNA = "black")

#Four non-correlated environmental predictors-----

#Exclude BIO01, BIO12 and BIO14
Env.stack.3 <- subset(Env.stack.2,c("TWI", "AVP", "pHc", "BIO05"))

#Check names
names(Env.stack.3)
#"TWI"   "AVP"   "pHc"   "BIO05"

#Plot raster layers
plot(Env.stack.3)

#save non correlated predictors
save(Env.stack.3, file="/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Env.stack.3.RData")

Env.stack.3.grid <- data.frame(TWI = values(Env.stack.3[["TWI"]]), 
                               AVP = values(Env.stack.3[["AVP"]]), 
                               pHc = values(Env.stack.3[["pHc"]]), 
                               BIO05 = values(Env.stack.3[["BIO05"]]))

plot(Env.stack.3[[1]], colNA = "black")
```

```{r Banksia - PCA}

#Adaptive (seven env)----
#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biological space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward Procrustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only calculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
ban.vars <- names(importance(ban.BP.lfmm.GF))
BM.grid.pre <- predict(ban.BP.lfmm.GF, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), ban.vars]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# BM.PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
BM.PCA <- prcomp(na.omit(BM.grid.pre), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(BM.PCA, file="BM.PCA.RData")
BM.PCs.full.gf <- BM.PCA # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=7):
#[1] 0.0095667523 0.0054621295 0.0041229836 0.0033851455 0.0021570427 0.0012334798 0.0006439396

#Rotation (n x k) = (7 x 7):
#             PC1         PC2          PC3         PC4          PC5         PC6         PC7
#AVP    0.5209919  0.78333654 -0.260581594 -0.21493578 -0.001210969 -0.01104705 -0.02697423
#BIO12  0.4303084 -0.17473650 -0.007906190  0.35119736  0.457103438  0.62930172  0.23650691
#BIO05 -0.4112206  0.25599960  0.158428482 -0.21105826  0.693520286  0.13491274 -0.44333372
#BIO01 -0.3475014  0.21086014  0.086261024 -0.28756589  0.145895413  0.03234994  0.84989039
#TWI   -0.2603594 -0.13399363 -0.947695488  0.02643516  0.121875976  0.02181718  0.01016928
#BIO14  0.2446747 -0.09513557  0.002593847  0.26033997  0.505754900 -0.76411867  0.15373526
#pHc   -0.3548094  0.46781209  0.036887799  0.79671047 -0.134749205  0.01600025  0.02721146
#BM.PCs.gf <- BM.PCA$x # Output for ensemble model generation

summary(BM.PCA)
#Importance of components:
#                            PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.009567 0.005462 0.004123 0.003385 0.002157 0.001233 0.0006439
#Proportion of Variance 0.585170 0.190750 0.108690 0.073270 0.029750 0.009730 0.0026500
#Cumulative Proportion  0.585170 0.775920 0.884610 0.957870 0.987620 0.997350 1.0000000

BM.a1 <- BM.PCA$x[, 1]
BM.a2 <- BM.PCA$x[, 2]
BM.a3 <- BM.PCA$x[, 3]
BM.r <- BM.a1 + BM.a2
BM.g <- -BM.a2
BM.b <- BM.a3 + BM.a2 - BM.a1
# Scale colors
BM.r <- (BM.r - min(BM.r))/(max(BM.r) - min(BM.r)) * 255
BM.g <- (BM.g - min(BM.g))/(max(BM.g) - min(BM.g)) * 255
BM.b <- (BM.b - min(BM.b))/(max(BM.b) - min(BM.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (BM.PCA biplot)
BM.nvs <- dim(BM.PCA$rotation)[1]
BM.vec <- ban.vars
BM.lv <- length(BM.vec)
BM.vind <- rownames(BM.PCA$rotation) %in% BM.vec
scal <- 20
BM.xrng <- range(BM.PCA$x[, 1], BM.PCA$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
BM.yrng <- range(BM.PCA$x[, 2], BM.PCA$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
BM.trns_site <- predict(ban.BP.lfmm.GF)
BM.PCA.sites <- predict(BM.PCA, BM.trns_site[, ban.vars])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(BM.PCA.sites, file="BM.PCA.sites.csv")
BM.PCA.sites_names <- read.csv("BM.PCA.sites.csv") 

#tiff("BM_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("BM_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("BM_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_3.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((BM.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = BM.xrng, ylim = BM.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (59%)", ylab = "PC2 (19%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(BM.r, BM.g, BM.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="grey70")
#rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
#par(new = TRUE)
#plot((BM.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = BM.xrng, ylim = BM.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (59%)", ylab = "PC2 (19%)", 
#     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(BM.r, BM.g, BM.b, max = 255), 
#     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
arrows(rep(0, BM.lv), rep(0, BM.lv), 
       BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 1]/scal, 
       BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.2, lwd = 5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, BM.lv), rep(0, BM.lv), 
       BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 1]/scal, 
       BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B7B7B7","#4292C6","#CC79A7","#EFB6D6","#B78560","#E7F4FF","#43BA8F"))
#abline(h = 0, v = 0, col = "grey70", lwd = 1)
#axis(1, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0) 
#axis(2, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0)
points(BM.PCA.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           19,
                                           19,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 1, cex = 1.5, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 1]/scal + jit * sign(BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 1]), 
     BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 2]/scal + jit * sign(BM.PCA$rotation[BM.vec, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = BM.vec,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(BM.PCA.sites_names[, 3], 
#BM.PCA.sites_names[, 4], 
#BM.PCA.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *BM.PCA is remvoing NAs, so the BM.vector is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
BM.pcs <- as.data.frame(BM.PCA$x)
BM.pcs$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
BM.pcs <- merge(BM.pcs, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
BM.pcs$r <- BM.pcs$PC1 + BM.pcs$PC2
BM.pcs$g <- -BM.pcs$PC2
BM.pcs$b <- BM.pcs$PC3 + BM.pcs$PC2 - BM.pcs$PC1
BM.pcs$r <- (BM.pcs$r - min(BM.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.pcs$g <- (BM.pcs$g - min(BM.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.pcs$b <- (BM.pcs$b - min(BM.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.raster.r <- BM.raster.g <- BM.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(BM.raster.r) <- BM.pcs$r
values(BM.raster.g) <- BM.pcs$g
values(BM.raster.b) <- BM.pcs$b
BM.rgbmap <- stack(BM.raster.r, BM.raster.g, BM.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition
#Load geo coords
BM.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/BM/BM_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("BM_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(BM.rgbmap)
points(BM.coords$lon, BM.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

BM.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/BM/BM_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills.tif")

dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

tmap_mode("plot")
bm.tm <- 
  tm_shape(BM.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+
  tm_rgb()+
  tm_grid(col = "grey70", lwd = 2, labels.size = 1, 
          lines = FALSE, labels.col = "grey70") +
  tm_xlab("Longitude", size = 1.5)+
  tm_ylab("Latitude", size = 1.5)+
  #tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  #tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = c(25,
                        24,
                        22,
                        24,
                        24,
                        24,
                        21,
                        24,
                        24,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        23,
                        19,
                        19,
                        23,
                        21,
                        21,
                        21,
                        22,
                        25,
                        23,
                        24,
                        24,
                        25,
                        25,
                        22,
                        22),
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=1,
             size = 1)+
  #tm_text("Pop", just = "top", col = "black", #bg.color = "black",
  #        size = 2, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = F)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+
  tm_compass(type = "arrow", position = c("left", "top"), size=4)+
  tm_scale_bar(breaks = c(0, 5, 10), text.size = 1, position = "right")+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05), frame=FALSE)

tmap_save(bm.tm, filename = "BM_GF_map_3.pdf")

#load GF object (ban.BP.lfmm.GF.vif) 
load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/BM/vif/BM_GF_BP_LF_VIF.RData") 

#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biological space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward Procrustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only calculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
ban.vars.vif <- names(importance(ban.BP.lfmm.GF.vif))
BM.grid.pre.vif <- predict(ban.BP.lfmm.GF.vif, Env.stack.3.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid), ban.vars.vif]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# BM.PCA.vif of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
BM.PCA.vif <- prcomp(na.omit(BM.grid.pre.vif), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(BM.PCA.vif, file="BM.PCA.vif.RData")
BM.pcs.vif.full.gf.vif <- BM.PCA.vif # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=4):
#  [1] 0.013427469 0.007274120 0.005554043 0.003607013

#Rotation (n x k) = (4 x 4):
#             PC1       PC2        PC3         PC4
#AVP    0.8824557 0.4335288 -0.1309682  0.12716902
#BIO05 -0.3399763 0.5288816  0.1917159  0.75362149
#TWI   -0.2227014 0.1514399 -0.9623002  0.03805788
#pHc   -0.2368376 0.7137247  0.1416711 -0.64376571

summary(BM.PCA.vif)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4
#Standard deviation     0.01343 0.007274 0.005554 0.003607
#Proportion of Variance 0.65073 0.190970 0.111340 0.046960
#Cumulative Proportion  0.65073 0.841710 0.953040 1.000000

BM.a1.vif <- BM.PCA.vif$x[, 1]
BM.a2.vif <- BM.PCA.vif$x[, 2]
BM.a3.vif <- BM.PCA.vif$x[, 3]
BM.r.vif <- BM.a1.vif + BM.a2.vif
BM.g.vif <- -BM.a2.vif
BM.b.vif <- BM.a3.vif + BM.a2.vif - BM.a1.vif
# Scale colors
BM.r.vif <- (BM.r.vif - min(BM.r.vif))/(max(BM.r.vif) - min(BM.r.vif)) * 255
BM.g.vif <- (BM.g.vif - min(BM.g.vif))/(max(BM.g.vif) - min(BM.g.vif)) * 255
BM.b.vif <- (BM.b.vif - min(BM.b.vif))/(max(BM.b.vif) - min(BM.b.vif)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (BM.PCA.vif biplot)
BM.nvs.vif <- dim(BM.PCA.vif$rotation)[1]
BM.vec.vif <- ban.vars.vif
BM.lv.vif <- length(BM.vec.vif)
BM.vind.vif <- rownames(BM.PCA.vif$rotation) %in% BM.vec.vif
scal <- 20
BM.xrng.vif <- range(BM.PCA.vif$x[, 1], BM.PCA.vif$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
BM.yrng.vif <- range(BM.PCA.vif$x[, 2], BM.PCA.vif$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
BM.trns_site.vif <- predict(ban.BP.lfmm.GF.vif)
BM.PCA.vif.sites <- predict(BM.PCA.vif, BM.trns_site.vif[, ban.vars.vif])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(BM.PCA.vif.sites, file="BM.PCA.vif.sites.csv")
BM.PCA.vif.sites_names <- read.csv("BM.PCA.vif.sites.csv") 

#tiff("BM_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)

tiff("BM_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((BM.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = BM.xrng.vif, ylim = BM.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (65%)", ylab = "PC2 (19%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(BM.r.vif, BM.g.vif, BM.b.vif, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="white")

       bg = NA, 
       col = "black")
text(BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 1]/scal + jit * sign(BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 1]), 
     BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 2]/scal + jit * sign(BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
arrows(rep(0, BM.lv.vif), rep(0, BM.lv.vif), 
       BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 1]/scal, 
       BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, BM.lv.vif), rep(0, BM.lv.vif), 
       BM.PCA.vif$rotation[BM.vec.vif, 1]/scal,

#Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *BM.PCA.vif is remvoing NAs, so the BM.vec.viftor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.3.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.3.grid)
Env.stack.3.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid)
BM.pcs.vif <- as.data.frame(BM.PCA.vif$x)
BM.pcs.vif$x <- Env.stack.3.grid$x[Env.stack.3.grid$nas]
BM.pcs.vif <- merge(BM.pcs.vif, Env.stack.3.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
BM.pcs.vif$r <- BM.pcs.vif$PC1 + BM.pcs.vif$PC2
BM.pcs.vif$g <- -BM.pcs.vif$PC2
BM.pcs.vif$b <- BM.pcs.vif$PC3 + BM.pcs.vif$PC2 - BM.pcs.vif$PC1
BM.pcs.vif$r <- (BM.pcs.vif$r - min(BM.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.pcs.vif$g <- (BM.pcs.vif$g - min(BM.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.pcs.vif$b <- (BM.pcs.vif$b - min(BM.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.raster.r.vif <- BM.raster.g.vif <- BM.raster.b.vif <- Env.stack.3[[1]]
values(BM.raster.r.vif) <- BM.pcs.vif$r
values(BM.raster.g.vif) <- BM.pcs.vif$g
values(BM.raster.b.vif) <- BM.pcs.vif$b
BM.rgbmap.vif <- stack(BM.raster.r.vif, BM.raster.g.vif, BM.raster.b.vif)

#save(BM.rgbmap.vif, file="BM.rgbmap.vif.RData")

BM.rgbmap.vif.spat <- rast(BM.rgbmap.vif)

ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster_rgb(data = BM.rgbmap.vif.spat) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  
  geom_point(data = BM.coords.shp, aes(x = lon, y = lat, shape = Pop),
             size = 10, colour = "black", fill = "white",stroke = 1.5) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(25,
                                24,
                                22,
                                24,
                                24,
                                24,
                                21,
                                24,
                                24,
                                23,
                                22,
                                23,
                                22,
                                23,
                                23,
                                9,
                                9,
                                23,
                                21,
                                21,
                                21,
                                22,
                                25,
                                23,
                                24,
                                24,
                                25,
                                25,
                                22,
                                22)) +  
  geom_label_repel(data = BM.coords.shp, aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = Pop),
                   color = "black", 
                   fontface = "bold",
                   segment.color = "grey30",
                   segment.size = 1,
                   min.segment.length = 0.1,
                   na.rm = TRUE,
                   show.legend = TRUE,
                   size = 10,
                   box.padding = 1,        
                   point.padding = 0.5,     
                   force = 2,
                   max.overlaps = Inf) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

ggsave(file = "BM_GF_map_vif.pdf", width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)

#Neutral----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
ban.vars.neu <- names(importance(ban.BP.lfmm.GF.neu))
BM.neu.grid.pre.neu <- predict(ban.BP.lfmm.GF.neu, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), ban.vars.neu]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# BM.PCA.neu of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
BM.PCA.neu <- prcomp(na.omit(BM.neu.grid.pre.neu), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
summary(BM.PCA.neu)

#Importance of components:
#                            PC1    PC2      PC3      PC4       PC5       PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.007681 0.0052 0.002229 0.001366 0.0006556 0.0005587 0.0002445
#Proportion of Variance 0.629830 0.2887 0.053030 0.019910 0.0045900 0.0033300 0.0006400
#Cumulative Proportion  0.629830 0.9185 0.971530 0.991440 0.9960300 0.9993600 1.0000000

BM.a1.neu<- BM.PCA.neu$x[, 1]
BM.a2.neu <- BM.PCA.neu$x[, 2]
BM.a3.neu <- BM.PCA.neu$x[, 3]
BM.neu.r <- BM.a1.neu+ BM.a2.neu
BM.neu.g <- -BM.a2.neu 
BM.neu.b <- BM.a3.neu + BM.a2.neu - BM.a1.neu
# scale colors
BM.neu.r <- (BM.neu.r - min(BM.neu.r))/(max(BM.neu.r) - min(BM.neu.r)) * 255
BM.neu.g <- (BM.neu.g - min(BM.neu.g))/(max(BM.neu.g) - min(BM.neu.g)) * 255
BM.neu.b <- (BM.neu.b - min(BM.neu.b))/(max(BM.neu.b) - min(BM.neu.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (BM.PCA.neu biplot)
BM.nvs.neu <- dim(BM.PCA.neu$rotation)[1]
BM.vec.neu <- ban.vars.neu
BM.lv.neu <- length(BM.vec.neu)
BM.vind.neu <- rownames(BM.PCA.neu$rotation) %in% BM.vec.neu
scal <- 40
BM.xrng.neu <- range(BM.PCA.neu$x[, 1], BM.PCA.neu$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
BM.yrng.neu <- range(BM.PCA.neu$x[, 2], BM.PCA.neu$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
BM.trns_site.neu <- predict(ban.BP.lfmm.GF.neu)
BM.PCA.neu.sites <- predict(BM.PCA.neu, BM.trns_site.neu[, ban.vars.neu])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(BM.PCA.neu.sites, file="BM.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 
BM.PCA.neu.sites_names <- read.csv("BM.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 

knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)
tiff("BM_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_N_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(4.3, 4.5, 0.5, 0.5))
plot((BM.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = BM.xrng.neu, ylim = BM.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (63%)", ylab = "PC2 (29%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(BM.neu.r, BM.neu.g, BM.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
par(new = TRUE)
plot((BM.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = BM.xrng.neu, ylim = BM.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (63%)", ylab = "PC2 (29%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(BM.neu.r, BM.neu.g, BM.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
points(BM.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           19,
                                           19,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 1]/scal + jit * sign(BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 1]), 
     BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 2]/scal + jit * sign(BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
arrows(rep(0, BM.lv.neu), rep(0, BM.lv.neu), 
       BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 4, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, BM.lv.neu), rep(0, BM.lv.neu), 
       BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       BM.PCA.neu$rotation[BM.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#E7F4FF","#B7B7B7","#4292C6","#EFB6D6","#CC79A7","#43BA8F","#B78560"))
# Light gray background
addTextLabels(BM.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3], 
              BM.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 4], 
              BM.PCA.neu.sites_names$Pop ,
              col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
              cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()


# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *BM.PCA.neu is remvoing NAs, so the BM.vec.neutor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
BM.pcs.neu <- as.data.frame(BM.PCA.neu$x)
BM.pcs.neu$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
BM.pcs.neu <- merge(BM.pcs.neu, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
BM.pcs.neu$r <- BM.pcs.neu$PC1 + BM.pcs.neu$PC2
BM.pcs.neu$g <- -BM.pcs.neu$PC2
BM.pcs.neu$b <- BM.pcs.neu$PC3 + BM.pcs.neu$PC2 - BM.pcs.neu$PC1
BM.pcs.neu$r <- (BM.pcs.neu$r - min(BM.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.pcs.neu$g <- (BM.pcs.neu$g - min(BM.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.pcs.neu$b <- (BM.pcs.neu$b - min(BM.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(BM.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(BM.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
BM.neu.raster.r <- BM.neu.raster.g <- BM.neu.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(BM.neu.raster.r) <- BM.pcs.neu$r
values(BM.neu.raster.g) <- BM.pcs.neu$g
values(BM.neu.raster.b) <- BM.pcs.neu$b
BM.neu.rgbmap <- stack(BM.neu.raster.r, BM.neu.raster.g, BM.neu.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
BM.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/BM/BM_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("BM_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF_N.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(BM.neu.rgbmap)
points(BM.coords$lon, BM.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

BM.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/BM/BM_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh.shp")

hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills.tif")

dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

tmap_mode("plot")
BM.tm <- 
  tm_shape(BM.neu.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+
  tm_rgb()+
  tm_grid(labels.size = 1, lines = FALSE, col = "white", labels.col = "white")+
  tm_xlab("Longitude", size = 2)+
  tm_ylab("Latitude", size = 2)+
  tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = c(25,
                        24,
                        22,
                        24,
                        24,
                        24,
                        21,
                        24,
                        24,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        23,
                        19,
                        19,
                        23,
                        21,
                        21,
                        21,
                        22,
                        25,
                        23,
                        24,
                        24,
                        25,
                        25,
                        22,
                        22),
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=2,
             size = 0.4)+
  #tm_text("Pop", just = "top", col = "white", bg.color = "black",
  #        size = 0.8, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = T)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05), frame=FALSE)
tmap_save(BM.tm, filename = "BM_GF_map_N_labels.tiff", dpi=600)

save(BM.neu.rgbmap, file="BM.neu.rgbmap.Rdata")
```

```{r Callitris - PCA}

##Adaptive----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
cal.vars <- names(importance(cal.BP.lfmm.GF))
CR.grid.pre <- predict(cal.BP.lfmm.GF, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), cal.vars]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# CR.PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
CR.PCA <- prcomp(na.omit(CR.grid.pre), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(CR.PCA, file="CR.PCA.RData")
CR.PCs.full.gf <- CR.PCA # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=7):
#[1] 0.0111414519 0.0064666684 0.0056045009 0.0028232436 0.0020175526 0.0010237834 0.0006450939

#Rotation (n x k) = (7 x 7):
#             PC1        PC2           PC3          PC4         PC5         PC6          PC7
#AVP    0.4613825 -0.5534388 -0.6914252023  0.046875911  0.02178992 -0.00613698 -0.007287571
#TWI   -0.3678132  0.5912715 -0.7152174760  0.032038175  0.04740630  0.01727462  0.001787478
#BIO05 -0.4356531 -0.3332978 -0.0007281539 -0.002828476  0.68495055  0.26857354 -0.397267482
#BIO12  0.3974810  0.2617294  0.0408456785 -0.215356205  0.30996701  0.70757412  0.358774643
#BIO01 -0.3946878 -0.2919594 -0.0232074095  0.147470072  0.13791622 -0.11037073  0.839936098
#BIO14  0.3011991  0.2142367  0.0333878931 -0.291050174  0.59661720 -0.64365941  0.085482375
#pHc   -0.2399074 -0.1826914 -0.0841006346 -0.918657871 -0.23888924  0.01979676  0.024558380

CR.PCs.gf <- CR.PCA$x # Output for ensemble model generation

summary(CR.PCA)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.01114 0.006467 0.005605 0.002823 0.002018 0.001024 0.0006451
#Proportion of Variance 0.58868 0.198310 0.148960 0.037800 0.019300 0.004970 0.0019700
#Cumulative Proportion  0.58868 0.786990 0.935950 0.973750 0.993060 0.998030 1.0000000

CR.a1 <- CR.PCA$x[, 1]
CR.a2 <- CR.PCA$x[, 2]
CR.a3 <- CR.PCA$x[, 3]
CR.r <- CR.a1 + CR.a2
CR.g <- -CR.a2
CR.b <- CR.a3 + CR.a2 - CR.a1
# Scale colors
CR.r <- (CR.r - min(CR.r))/(max(CR.r) - min(CR.r)) * 255
CR.g <- (CR.g - min(CR.g))/(max(CR.g) - min(CR.g)) * 255
CR.b <- (CR.b - min(CR.b))/(max(CR.b) - min(CR.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (CR.PCA biplot)
CR.nvs <- dim(CR.PCA$rotation)[1]
CR.vec <- cal.vars
CR.lv <- length(CR.vec)
CR.vind <- rownames(CR.PCA$rotation) %in% CR.vec
scal <- 20
CR.xrng <- range(CR.PCA$x[, 1], CR.PCA$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
CR.yrng <- range(CR.PCA$x[, 2], CR.PCA$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
CR.trns_site <- predict(cal.BP.lfmm.GF)
CR.PCA.sites <- predict(CR.PCA, CR.trns_site[, cal.vars])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(CR.PCA.sites, file="CR.PCA.sites.csv")
CR.PCA.sites_names <- read.csv("CR.PCA.sites.csv") 

#tiff("CR_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("CR_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("CR_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_3.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((CR.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = CR.xrng, ylim = CR.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (59%)", ylab = "PC2 (20%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(CR.r, CR.g, CR.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="grey70")
arrows(rep(0, CR.lv), rep(0, CR.lv), 
       CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 1]/scal, 
       CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.2, lwd = 5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, CR.lv), rep(0, CR.lv), 
       CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 1]/scal, 
       CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B7B7B7","#B78560","#CC79A7","#4292C6","#EFB6D6","#E7F4FF","#43BA8F"))
points(CR.PCA.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           19,
                                           19,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22), lwd = 1, cex = 1.5, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 1]/scal + jit * sign(CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 1]), 
     CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 2]/scal + jit * sign(CR.PCA$rotation[CR.vec, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = CR.vec,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(CR.PCA.sites_names[, 3], 
#CR.PCA.sites_names[, 4], 
#CR.PCA.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *CR.PCA is remvoing NAs, so the CR.vector is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
CR.pcs <- as.data.frame(CR.PCA$x)
CR.pcs$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
CR.pcs <- merge(CR.pcs, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
CR.pcs$r <- CR.pcs$PC1 + CR.pcs$PC2
CR.pcs$g <- -CR.pcs$PC2
CR.pcs$b <- CR.pcs$PC3 + CR.pcs$PC2 - CR.pcs$PC1
CR.pcs$r <- (CR.pcs$r - min(CR.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.pcs$g <- (CR.pcs$g - min(CR.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.pcs$b <- (CR.pcs$b - min(CR.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.raster.r <- CR.raster.g <- CR.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(CR.raster.r) <- CR.pcs$r
values(CR.raster.g) <- CR.pcs$g
values(CR.raster.b) <- CR.pcs$b
CR.rgbmap <- stack(CR.raster.r, CR.raster.g, CR.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
CR.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/CR/CR_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("CR_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(CR.rgbmap)
points(CR.coords$lon, CR.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

CR.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/CR/cr_coords_Ch2.shp")

tmap_mode("plot")
CR.tm <- 
  tm_shape(CR.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+
  tm_rgb()+
  tm_grid(col = "grey70", lwd = 2, labels.size = 1, 
          lines = FALSE, labels.col = "grey70") +
  tm_xlab("Longitude", size = 1.5)+
  tm_ylab("Latitude", size = 1.5)+
  #tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  #tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(CR.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = c(24,
                        22,
                        24,
                        24,
                        24,
                        21,
                        24,
                        24,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,

                        25,

                        22),
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=1,
             size = 1)+
  #tm_text("Pop", just = "top", col = "black", #bg.color = "black",
  #        size = 2, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = F)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05), frame=FALSE)
#tmap_save(CR.tm, filename = "CR_GF_map_labels.pdf")
tmap_save(CR.tm, filename = "CR_GF_map_3.pdf")

save(CR.rgbmap, file="CR.rgbmap.Rdata")

#Adaptive (four env)----
##load GF object (cal.BP.lfmm.GF.vif) 
 
load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/CR/vif/CR_GF_BP_LF_VIF.RData") 

#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biological space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward Procrustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only calculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
cal.vars.vif <- names(importance(cal.BP.lfmm.GF.vif))
CR.grid.pre.vif <- predict(cal.BP.lfmm.GF.vif, Env.stack.3.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid), cal.vars.vif]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# CR.PCA.vif of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
CR.PCA.vif <- prcomp(na.omit(CR.grid.pre.vif), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(CR.PCA.vif, file="CR.PCA.vif.RData")
CR.pcs.vif.full.gf.vif <- CR.PCA.vif # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=4):
#  [1] 0.013668758 0.008437451 0.008094986 0.004026576

#Rotation (n x k) = (4 x 4):
#             PC1        PC2       PC3         PC4
#TWI    0.5956679 -0.7598499 0.2595078  0.02153203
#AVP   -0.5844038 -0.1890759 0.7758388  0.14421067
#BIO05  0.4078885  0.4342836 0.2726631  0.75543333
#pHc    0.3705116  0.4452822 0.5063445 -0.63879586

summary(CR.PCA.vif)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4
#Standard deviation     0.01367 0.008437 0.008095 0.004027
#Proportion of Variance 0.54989 0.209530 0.192860 0.047720
#Cumulative Proportion  0.54989 0.759420 0.952280 1.000000

CR.a1.vif <- CR.PCA.vif$x[, 1]
CR.a2.vif <- CR.PCA.vif$x[, 2]
CR.a3.vif <- CR.PCA.vif$x[, 3]
CR.r.vif <- CR.a1.vif + CR.a2.vif
CR.g.vif <- -CR.a2.vif
CR.b.vif <- CR.a3.vif + CR.a2.vif - CR.a1.vif
# Scale colors
CR.r.vif <- (CR.r.vif - min(CR.r.vif))/(max(CR.r.vif) - min(CR.r.vif)) * 255
CR.g.vif <- (CR.g.vif - min(CR.g.vif))/(max(CR.g.vif) - min(CR.g.vif)) * 255
CR.b.vif <- (CR.b.vif - min(CR.b.vif))/(max(CR.b.vif) - min(CR.b.vif)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (CR.PCA.vif biplot)
CR.nvs.vif <- dim(CR.PCA.vif$rotation)[1]
CR.vec.vif <- cal.vars.vif
CR.lv.vif <- length(CR.vec.vif)
CR.vind.vif <- rownames(CR.PCA.vif$rotation) %in% CR.vec.vif
scal <- 20
CR.xrng.vif <- range(CR.PCA.vif$x[, 1], CR.PCA.vif$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
CR.yrng.vif <- range(CR.PCA.vif$x[, 2], CR.PCA.vif$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
CR.trns_site.vif <- predict(cal.BP.lfmm.GF.vif)
CR.PCA.vif.sites <- predict(CR.PCA.vif, CR.trns_site.vif[, cal.vars.vif])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(CR.PCA.vif.sites, file="CR.PCA.vif.sites.csv")
CR.PCA.vif.sites_names <- read.csv("CR.PCA.vif.sites.csv") 

#tiff("CR_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("CR_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("CR_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((CR.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = CR.xrng.vif, ylim = CR.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (55%)", ylab = "PC2 (21%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(CR.r.vif, CR.g.vif, CR.b.vif, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="white")
#rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
#par(new = TRUE)
#plot((CR.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = CR.xrng.vif, ylim = CR.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (55%)", ylab = "PC2 (21%)", 
#     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(CR.r, CR.g, CR.b, max = 255), 
#     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
#abline(h = 0, v = 0, col = "grey70", lwd = 1)
#axis(1, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0) 
#axis(2, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0)
points(CR.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           9,
                                           9,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = NA, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, CR.lv.vif), rep(0, CR.lv.vif), 
       CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 1]/scal, 
       CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, CR.lv.vif), rep(0, CR.lv.vif), 
       CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 1]/scal, 
       CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B78560","#B7B7B7","#CC79A7","#43BA8F"))
text(CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 1]/scal + jit * sign(CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 1]), 
     CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 2]/scal + jit * sign(CR.PCA.vif$rotation[CR.vec.vif, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = CR.vec.vif,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(CR.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 3], 
#CR.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 4], 
#CR.PCA.vif.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0,0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *CR.PCA.vif is remvoing NAs, so the CR.vec.viftor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.3.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.3.grid)
Env.stack.3.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid)
CR.pcs.vif <- as.data.frame(CR.PCA.vif$x)
CR.pcs.vif$x <- Env.stack.3.grid$x[Env.stack.3.grid$nas]
CR.pcs.vif <- merge(CR.pcs.vif, Env.stack.3.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
CR.pcs.vif$r <- CR.pcs.vif$PC1 + CR.pcs.vif$PC2
CR.pcs.vif$g <- -CR.pcs.vif$PC2
CR.pcs.vif$b <- CR.pcs.vif$PC3 + CR.pcs.vif$PC2 - CR.pcs.vif$PC1
CR.pcs.vif$r <- (CR.pcs.vif$r - min(CR.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.pcs.vif$g <- (CR.pcs.vif$g - min(CR.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.pcs.vif$b <- (CR.pcs.vif$b - min(CR.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.raster.r.vif <- CR.raster.g.vif <- CR.raster.b.vif <- Env.stack.3[[1]]
values(CR.raster.r.vif) <- CR.pcs.vif$r
values(CR.raster.g.vif) <- CR.pcs.vif$g
values(CR.raster.b.vif) <- CR.pcs.vif$b
CR.rgbmap.vif <- stack(CR.raster.r.vif, CR.raster.g.vif, CR.raster.b.vif)

###Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition----
#Load geo coords
CR.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/CR/CR_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("CR_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF_vif.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(CR.rgbmap.vif)
points(CR.coords$lon, CR.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

CR.coords.shp$Pop <- factor(
  CR.coords.shp$Pop,
  levels = unique(CR.coords.shp$Pop))

CR.rgbmap.vif.spat <- rast(CR.rgbmap.vif)

ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster_rgb(data = CR.rgbmap.vif.spat) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +

             size = 10, colour = "black", fill = "white",stroke = 1.5) +

  theme_minimal() +

        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

##Neutral----

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
cal.vars.neu <- names(importance(cal.BP.lfmm.GF.neu))
CR.neu.grid.pre.neu <- predict(cal.BP.lfmm.GF.neu, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), cal.vars.neu]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# CR.PCA.neu of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
CR.PCA.neu <- prcomp(na.omit(CR.neu.grid.pre.neu), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
summary(CR.PCA.neu)

#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4     PC5       PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.01226 0.007659 0.005514 0.003228 0.00139 0.0006879 0.0001324
#Proportion of Variance 0.59599 0.232580 0.120530 0.041300 0.00766 0.0018800 0.0000700
#Cumulative Proportion  0.59599 0.828570 0.949100 0.990400 0.99805 0.9999300 1.0000000

CR.a1.neu<- CR.PCA.neu$x[, 1]
CR.a2.neu <- CR.PCA.neu$x[, 2]
CR.a3.neu <- CR.PCA.neu$x[, 3]
CR.neu.r <- CR.a1.neu+ CR.a2.neu
CR.neu.g <- -CR.a2.neu
CR.neu.b <- CR.a3.neu + CR.a2.neu - CR.a1.neu
# Scale colors
CR.neu.r <- (CR.neu.r - min(CR.neu.r))/(max(CR.neu.r) - min(CR.neu.r)) * 255
CR.neu.g <- (CR.neu.g - min(CR.neu.g))/(max(CR.neu.g) - min(CR.neu.g)) * 255
CR.neu.b <- (CR.neu.b - min(CR.neu.b))/(max(CR.neu.b) - min(CR.neu.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (CR.PCA.neu biplot)
CR.nvs.neu <- dim(CR.PCA.neu$rotation)[1]
CR.vec.neu <- cal.vars.neu
CR.lv.neu <- length(CR.vec.neu)
CR.vind.neu <- rownames(CR.PCA.neu$rotation) %in% CR.vec.neu
scal <- 40
CR.xrng.neu <- range(CR.PCA.neu$x[, 1], CR.PCA.neu$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
CR.yrng.neu <- range(CR.PCA.neu$x[, 2], CR.PCA.neu$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
CR.trns_site.neu <- predict(cal.BP.lfmm.GF.neu)
CR.PCA.neu.sites <- predict(CR.PCA.neu, CR.trns_site.neu[, cal.vars.neu])
jit <- 0.001

write.csv(CR.PCA.neu.sites, file="CR.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 
CR.PCA.neu.sites_names <- read.csv("CR.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 

knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)

par(mar = c(4.3, 4.5, 0.5, 0.5))
plot((CR.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = CR.xrng.neu, ylim = CR.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (60%)", ylab = "PC2 (23%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(CR.neu.r, CR.neu.g, CR.neu.b, max = 255),

text(CR.PCA.neu$rotation[CR.vec.neu, 1]/scal + jit * sign(CR.PCA.neu$rotation[CR.vec.neu, 1]), 
     CR.PCA.neu$rotation[CR.vec.neu, 2]/scal + jit * sign(CR.PCA.neu$rotation[CR.vec.neu, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
arrows(rep(0, CR.lv.neu), rep(0, CR.lv.neu), 
       CR.PCA.neu$rotation[CR.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       CR.PCA.neu$rotation[CR.vec.neu, 2]/scal,

       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, CR.lv.neu), rep(0, CR.lv.neu),

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *CR.PCA.neu is remvoing NAs, so the CR.vec.neutor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
CR.pcs.neu <- as.data.frame(CR.PCA.neu$x)
CR.pcs.neu$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
CR.pcs.neu <- merge(CR.pcs.neu, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
CR.pcs.neu$r <- CR.pcs.neu$PC1 + CR.pcs.neu$PC2
CR.pcs.neu$g <- -CR.pcs.neu$PC2
CR.pcs.neu$b <- CR.pcs.neu$PC3 + CR.pcs.neu$PC2 - CR.pcs.neu$PC1
CR.pcs.neu$r <- (CR.pcs.neu$r - min(CR.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.pcs.neu$g <- (CR.pcs.neu$g - min(CR.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.pcs.neu$b <- (CR.pcs.neu$b - min(CR.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(CR.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(CR.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
CR.neu.raster.r <- CR.neu.raster.g <- CR.neu.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(CR.neu.raster.r) <- CR.pcs.neu$r
values(CR.neu.raster.g) <- CR.pcs.neu$g
values(CR.neu.raster.b) <- CR.pcs.neu$b
CR.neu.rgbmap <- stack(CR.neu.raster.r, CR.neu.raster.g, CR.neu.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
```
