```{r Epacris - PCA}

##Adaptive----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
epa.vars <- names(importance(epa.BP.lfmm.GF))
EI.grid.pre <- predict(epa.BP.lfmm.GF, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), epa.vars]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# EI.PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
EI.PCA <- prcomp(na.omit(EI.grid.pre), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(EI.PCA, file="EI.PCA.RData")
summary(EI.PCA)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.01672 0.006585 0.005658 0.003543 0.003236 0.001917 0.0009826
#Proportion of Variance 0.73060 0.113360 0.083700 0.032830 0.027380 0.009610 0.0025200
#Cumulative Proportion  0.73060 0.843950 0.927660 0.960480 0.987870 0.997480 1.0000000

EI.PCs.full.gf <- EI.PCA # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=7):
#[1] 0.0167170004 0.0065848755 0.0056583526 0.0035434857 0.0032364501 0.0019170093 0.0009826413

#Rotation (n x k) = (7 x 7):
#             PC1          PC2         PC3         PC4         PC5          PC6         PC7
#pHc   -0.5136124  0.464350811 -0.70911290  0.03343430 -0.12617485  0.023475240  0.01226771
#BIO12  0.4901904  0.050938732 -0.29993992  0.16210037  0.08528684  0.758704880  0.24077207
#BIO14  0.4170582  0.073609885 -0.32969361  0.42814774  0.44116739 -0.572005520  0.08256308
#BIO05 -0.3709391  0.053073064  0.21814024  0.40069291  0.60010070  0.309577795 -0.44214051
#TWI   -0.2088588 -0.841445667 -0.43864629 -0.14361720  0.18581341  0.027995994 -0.00055027
#BIO01 -0.3573772  0.006856314  0.23607327  0.09462163  0.26212451  0.001304731  0.85955788
#AVP    0.1142009  0.255872203 -0.05263786 -0.77405502  0.56464207 -0.001270289 -0.02708099

EI.PCs.gf <- EI.PCA$x # Output for ensemble model generation

EI.a1 <- EI.PCA$x[, 1]
EI.a2 <- EI.PCA$x[, 2]
EI.a3 <- EI.PCA$x[, 3]
EI.r <- EI.a1 + EI.a2
EI.g <- -EI.a2
EI.b <- EI.a3 + EI.a2 - EI.a1
# Scale colors
EI.r <- (EI.r - min(EI.r))/(max(EI.r) - min(EI.r)) * 255
EI.g <- (EI.g - min(EI.g))/(max(EI.g) - min(EI.g)) * 255
EI.b <- (EI.b - min(EI.b))/(max(EI.b) - min(EI.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (EI.PCA biplot)
EI.nvs <- dim(EI.PCA$rotation)[1]
EI.vec <- epa.vars
EI.lv <- length(EI.vec)
EI.vind <- rownames(EI.PCA$rotation) %in% EI.vec
scal <- 20
EI.xrng <- range(EI.PCA$x[, 1], EI.PCA$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
EI.yrng <- range(EI.PCA$x[, 2], EI.PCA$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
EI.trns_site <- predict(epa.BP.lfmm.GF)
EI.PCA.sites <- predict(EI.PCA, EI.trns_site[, epa.vars])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(EI.PCA.sites, file="EI.PCA.sites.csv")
EI.PCA.sites_names <- read.csv("EI.PCA.sites.csv")

#tiff("EI_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("EI_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("EI_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_3.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((EI.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EI.xrng, ylim = EI.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (73%)", ylab = "PC2 (11%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EI.r, EI.g, EI.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="grey70")
arrows(rep(0, EI.lv), rep(0, EI.lv), 
       EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 1]/scal, 
       EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.2, lwd = 5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EI.lv), rep(0, EI.lv), 
       EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 1]/scal, 
       EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#43BA8F","#4292C6","#E7F4FF","#CC79A7","#B78560","#EFB6D6","#B7B7B7"))
points(EI.PCA.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           19,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 1, cex = 1.5, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 1]/scal + jit * sign(EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 1]), 
     EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 2]/scal + jit * sign(EI.PCA$rotation[EI.vec, 2]),
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = EI.vec,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(EI.PCA.sites_names[, 3], 
#EI.PCA.sites_names[, 4], 
#EI.PCA.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *EI.PCA is remvoing NAs, so the EI.vector is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
EI.pcs <- as.data.frame(EI.PCA$x)
EI.pcs$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
EI.pcs <- merge(EI.pcs, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
EI.pcs$r <- EI.pcs$PC1 + EI.pcs$PC2
EI.pcs$g <- -EI.pcs$PC2
EI.pcs$b <- EI.pcs$PC3 + EI.pcs$PC2 - EI.pcs$PC1
EI.pcs$r <- (EI.pcs$r - min(EI.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.pcs$g <- (EI.pcs$g - min(EI.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.pcs$b <- (EI.pcs$b - min(EI.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.raster.r <- EI.raster.g <- EI.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(EI.raster.r) <- EI.pcs$r
values(EI.raster.g) <- EI.pcs$g
values(EI.raster.b) <- EI.pcs$b
EI.rgbmap <- stack(EI.raster.r, EI.raster.g, EI.raster.b)


#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
EI.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EI/EI_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("EI_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(EI.rgbmap)
points(EI.coords$lon, EI.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

EI.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EI/EI_coords_Ch2.shp")

tmap_mode("plot")
EI.tm <- 
  tm_shape(EI.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+
  tm_rgb()+
  tm_grid(col = "grey70", lwd = 2, labels.size = 1, 
          lines = FALSE, labels.col = "grey70") +
  tm_xlab("Longitude", size = 1.5)+
  tm_ylab("Latitude", size = 1.5)+
  #tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  #tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = c(25,
                        24,
                        22,
                        24,
                        24,
                        24,
                        21,
                        24,
                        24,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        23,
                        19,
                        23,
                        21,
                        21,
                        21,
                        22,
                        25,
                        23,
                        24,
                        24,
                        25,
                        25,
                        22,
                        22),
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=1,
             size = 1)+
  #tm_text("Pop", just = "top", col = "black",# bg.color = "black",
  #        size = 2, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = F)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05), frame=FALSE)

#Adaptive (four env)----
##load GF object (epa.BP.lfmm.GF.vif) 
 
load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EI/vif/EI_GF_BP_LF_VIF.RData") 

#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biologiepa space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward ProEIustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only epaculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
epa.vars.vif <- names(importance(epa.BP.lfmm.GF.vif))
EI.grid.pre.vif <- predict(epa.BP.lfmm.GF.vif, Env.stack.3.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid), epa.vars.vif]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# EI.PCA.vif of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
EI.PCA.vif <- prcomp(na.omit(EI.grid.pre.vif), center=TRUE, sepae.=FALSE)
save(EI.PCA.vif, file="EI.PCA.vif.RData")
EI.pcs.vif.full.gf.vif <- EI.PCA.vif # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=4):
#  [1] 0.021566050 0.012973156 0.008178401 0.006395288

#Rotation (n x k) = (4 x 4):
#             PC1        PC2        PC3        PC4
#pHc   -0.6879594  0.3988576 -0.5425818 -0.2706095
#TWI   -0.4040392 -0.8728784 -0.2142195  0.1701342
#BIO05 -0.5802777  0.1925890  0.6583791  0.4390036
#AVP    0.1635300  0.2047080 -0.4756594  0.8397027

summary(EI.PCA.vif)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1     PC2      PC3      PC4
#Standard deviation     0.02157 0.01297 0.008178 0.006395
#Proportion of Variance 0.62750 0.22707 0.090240 0.055180
#Cumulative Proportion  0.62750 0.85458 0.944820 1.000000

EI.a1.vif <- EI.PCA.vif$x[, 1]
EI.a2.vif <- EI.PCA.vif$x[, 2]
EI.a3.vif <- EI.PCA.vif$x[, 3]
EI.r.vif <- EI.a1.vif + EI.a2.vif
EI.g.vif <- -EI.a2.vif
EI.b.vif <- EI.a3.vif + EI.a2.vif - EI.a1.vif
# Sepae colors
EI.r.vif <- (EI.r.vif - min(EI.r.vif))/(max(EI.r.vif) - min(EI.r.vif)) * 255
EI.g.vif <- (EI.g.vif - min(EI.g.vif))/(max(EI.g.vif) - min(EI.g.vif)) * 255
EI.b.vif <- (EI.b.vif - min(EI.b.vif))/(max(EI.b.vif) - min(EI.b.vif)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (EI.PCA.vif biplot)
EI.nvs.vif <- dim(EI.PCA.vif$rotation)[1]
EI.vec.vif <- epa.vars.vif
EI.lv.vif <- length(EI.vec.vif)
EI.vind.vif <- rownames(EI.PCA.vif$rotation) %in% EI.vec.vif
sepa <- 20
EI.xrng.vif <- range(EI.PCA.vif$x[, 1], EI.PCA.vif$rotation[, 1]/sepa) * 1.1
EI.yrng.vif <- range(EI.PCA.vif$x[, 2], EI.PCA.vif$rotation[, 2]/sepa) * 1.1
EI.trns_site.vif <- predict(epa.BP.lfmm.GF.vif)
EI.PCA.vif.sites <- predict(EI.PCA.vif, EI.trns_site.vif[, epa.vars.vif])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(EI.PCA.vif.sites, file="EI.PCA.vif.sites.csv")
EI.PCA.vif.sites_names <- read.csv("EI.PCA.vif.sites.csv") 

#tiff("EI_Biplot_biologiepa_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("EI_Biplot_biologiepa_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("EI_Biplot_biologiepa_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((EI.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EI.xrng.vif, ylim = EI.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (63%)", ylab = "PC2 (23%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EI.r.vif, EI.g.vif, EI.b.vif, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="white")
#rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
#par(new = TRUE)
#plot((EI.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EI.xrng.vif, ylim = EI.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (63%)", ylab = "PC2 (23%)", 
#     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EI.r, EI.g, EI.b, max = 255), 
#     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
#abline(h = 0, v = 0, col = "grey70", lwd = 1)
#axis(1, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0) 
#axis(2, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0)
points(EI.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           9,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = NA, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EI.lv.vif), rep(0, EI.lv.vif), 
       EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 1]/sepa, 
       EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 2]/sepa, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EI.lv.vif), rep(0, EI.lv.vif), 
       EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 1]/sepa, 
       EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 2]/sepa, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#43BA8F","#B78560","#CC79A7","#B7B7B7"))
text(EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 1]/sepa + jit * sign(EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 1]), 
     EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 2]/sepa + jit * sign(EI.PCA.vif$rotation[EI.vec.vif, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = EI.vec.vif,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(EI.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 3], 
#EI.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 4], 
#EI.PCA.vif.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0,0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *EI.PCA.vif is remvoing NAs, so the EI.vec.viftor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.3.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.3.grid)
Env.stack.3.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid)
EI.pcs.vif <- as.data.frame(EI.PCA.vif$x)
EI.pcs.vif$x <- Env.stack.3.grid$x[Env.stack.3.grid$nas]
EI.pcs.vif <- merge(EI.pcs.vif, Env.stack.3.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
EI.pcs.vif$r <- EI.pcs.vif$PC1 + EI.pcs.vif$PC2
EI.pcs.vif$g <- -EI.pcs.vif$PC2
EI.pcs.vif$b <- EI.pcs.vif$PC3 + EI.pcs.vif$PC2 - EI.pcs.vif$PC1
EI.pcs.vif$r <- (EI.pcs.vif$r - min(EI.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.pcs.vif$g <- (EI.pcs.vif$g - min(EI.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.pcs.vif$b <- (EI.pcs.vif$b - min(EI.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.raster.r.vif <- EI.raster.g.vif <- EI.raster.b.vif <- Env.stack.3[[1]]
values(EI.raster.r.vif) <- EI.pcs.vif$r
values(EI.raster.g.vif) <- EI.pcs.vif$g
values(EI.raster.b.vif) <- EI.pcs.vif$b
EI.rgbmap.vif <- stack(EI.raster.r.vif, EI.raster.g.vif, EI.raster.b.vif)

###Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition----
#Load geo coords
EI.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EI/EI_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("EI_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF_vif.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(EI.rgbmap.vif)
points(EI.coords$lon, EI.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

EI.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EI/EI_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

#hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills.tif")

#dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

EI.coords.shp$Pop <- factor(
  EI.coords.shp$Pop,
  levels = unique(EI.coords.shp$Pop))

EI.rgbmap.vif.spat <- rast(EI.rgbmap.vif)

ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster_rgb(data = EI.rgbmap.vif.spat) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  
  geom_point(data = EI.coords.shp, aes(x = lon, y = lat, shape = Pop),
             size = 10, colour = "black", fill = "white",stroke = 1.5) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(25,
                                24,
                                22,
                                24,
                                24,
                                24,
                                21,
                                24,
                                24,
                                23,
                                22,
                                23,
                                23,
                                9,
                                23,
                                21,
                                21,
                                21,
                                22,
                                25,
                                23,
                                24,
                                24,
                                25,
                                25,
                                22,
                                22)) +  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

ggsave(file = "EI_GF_map_vif.pdf", width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)

save(EI.rgbmap.vif, file="EI.rgbmap.vif.Rdata")

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
epa.vars.neu <- names(importance(epa.BP.lfmm.GF.neu))
EI.neu.grid.pre.neu <- predict(epa.BP.lfmm.GF.neu, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), epa.vars.neu]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# EI.PCA.neu of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
EI.PCA.neu <- prcomp(na.omit(EI.neu.grid.pre.neu), center=TRUE, sepae.=FALSE)
summary(EI.PCA.neu)

#Importance of components:
#                            PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6      PC7
#Standard deviation     0.008683 0.003485 0.002717 0.002606 0.002062 0.001097 0.000465
#Proportion of Variance 0.702100 0.113110 0.068740 0.063230 0.039590 0.011210 0.002010
#Cumulative Proportion  0.702100 0.815220 0.883960 0.947190 0.986780 0.997990 1.000000

EI.a1.neu<- EI.PCA.neu$x[, 1]
EI.a2.neu <- EI.PCA.neu$x[, 2]
EI.a3.neu <- EI.PCA.neu$x[, 3]
EI.neu.r <- EI.a1.neu+ EI.a2.neu
EI.neu.g <- -EI.a2.neu
EI.neu.b <- EI.a3.neu + EI.a2.neu - EI.a1.neu
# Sepae colors
EI.neu.r <- (EI.neu.r - min(EI.neu.r))/(max(EI.neu.r) - min(EI.neu.r)) * 255
EI.neu.g <- (EI.neu.g - min(EI.neu.g))/(max(EI.neu.g) - min(EI.neu.g)) * 255
EI.neu.b <- (EI.neu.b - min(EI.neu.b))/(max(EI.neu.b) - min(EI.neu.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (EI.PCA.neu biplot)
EI.nvs.neu <- dim(EI.PCA.neu$rotation)[1]
EI.vec.neu <- epa.vars.neu
EI.lv.neu <- length(EI.vec.neu)
EI.vind.neu <- rownames(EI.PCA.neu$rotation) %in% EI.vec.neu
sepa <- 31
EI.xrng.neu <- range(EI.PCA.neu$x[, 1], EI.PCA.neu$rotation[, 1]/sepa) * 1.1
EI.yrng.neu <- range(EI.PCA.neu$x[, 2], EI.PCA.neu$rotation[, 2]/sepa) * 1.1
EI.trns_site.neu <- predict(epa.BP.lfmm.GF.neu)
EI.PCA.neu.sites <- predict(EI.PCA.neu, EI.trns_site.neu[, epa.vars.neu])
jit <- 0.001

write.csv(EI.PCA.neu.sites, file="EI.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 
EI.PCA.neu.sites_names <- read.csv("EI.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 

knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)
tiff("EI_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_N.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(4.3, 4.5, 0.5, 0.5))
plot((EI.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EI.xrng.neu, ylim = EI.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (70%)", ylab = "PC2 (11%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EI.neu.r, EI.neu.g, EI.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
par(new = TRUE)
plot((EI.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EI.xrng.neu, ylim = EI.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (70%)", ylab = "PC2 (11%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EI.neu.r, EI.neu.g, EI.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
points(EI.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                               24,
                                               22,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               21,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               23,
                                               22,
                                               23,
                                               23,
                                               19,
                                               23,
                                               21,
                                               21,
                                               21,
                                               22,
                                               25,
                                               23,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               25,
                                               25,
                                               22,
                                               22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 1]/scal + jit * sign(EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 1]), 
     EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 2]/scal + jit * sign(EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
arrows(rep(0, EI.lv.neu), rep(0, EI.lv.neu), 
       EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 4, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EI.lv.neu), rep(0, EI.lv.neu), 
       EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       EI.PCA.neu$rotation[EI.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#CC79A7","#E7F4FF","#4292C6","#B78560","#EFB6D6","#43BA8F","#B7B7B7"))
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(EI.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3], 
#              EI.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 4], 
#              EI.PCA.neu.sites_names$Pop ,
#              col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
#              cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *EI.PCA.neu is remvoing NAs, so the EI.vec.neutor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
EI.pcs.neu <- as.data.frame(EI.PCA.neu$x)
EI.pcs.neu$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
EI.pcs.neu <- merge(EI.pcs.neu, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
EI.pcs.neu$r <- EI.pcs.neu$PC1 + EI.pcs.neu$PC2
EI.pcs.neu$g <- -EI.pcs.neu$PC2
EI.pcs.neu$b <- EI.pcs.neu$PC3 + EI.pcs.neu$PC2 - EI.pcs.neu$PC1
EI.pcs.neu$r <- (EI.pcs.neu$r - min(EI.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.pcs.neu$g <- (EI.pcs.neu$g - min(EI.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.pcs.neu$b <- (EI.pcs.neu$b - min(EI.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EI.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EI.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EI.neu.raster.r <- EI.neu.raster.g <- EI.neu.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(EI.neu.raster.r) <- EI.pcs.neu$r
values(EI.neu.raster.g) <- EI.pcs.neu$g
values(EI.neu.raster.b) <- EI.pcs.neu$b
EI.neu.rgbmap <- stack(EI.neu.raster.r, EI.neu.raster.g, EI.neu.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
EI.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EI/EI_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("EI_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF_N.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(EI.neu.rgbmap)
points(EI.coords$lon, EI.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

EI.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EI/EI_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh.shp")

hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills.tif")

dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

tmap_mode("plot")
EI.tm <- 
  tm_shape(EI.neu.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+
  tm_rgb()+
  tm_grid(labels.size = 1, lines = FALSE, col = "white", labels.col = "white")+
  tm_xlab("Longitude", size = 2)+
  tm_ylab("Latitude", size = 2)+
  tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = c(25,
                        24,
                        22,
                        24,
                        24,
                        24,
                        21,
                        24,
                        24,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        23,
                        19,
                        23,
                        21,
                        21,
                        21,
                        22,
                        25,
                        23,
                        24,
                        24,
                        25,
                        25,
                        22,
                        22),
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=2,
             size = 0.4)+
  #tm_text("Pop", just = "top", col = "white", bg.color = "black",
  #        size = 0.8, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = T)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05), frame=FALSE)
tmap_save(EI.tm, filename = "EI_GF_map_N_labels.tiff", dpi=600)


save(EI.neu.rgbmap, file="EI.neu.rgbmap.Rdata")
```

```{r Eucalyptus - PCA}

##Adaptive----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
euc.vars <- names(importance(euc.BP.lfmm.GF))
EO.grid.pre <- predict(euc.BP.lfmm.GF, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), euc.vars]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# EO.PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
EO.PCA <- prcomp(na.omit(EO.grid.pre), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(EO.PCA, file="EO.PCA.RData")
EO.PCs.full.gf <- EO.PCA # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=7):
#[1] 0.017589228 0.008059551 0.005457868 0.004561474 0.003327942 0.001705325 0.001669697

#Rotation (n x k) = (7 x 7):
#             PC1         PC2         PC3         PC4         PC5         PC6         PC7
#BIO14  0.5092754  0.13298321 -0.30191265 -0.16642154  0.67228957 -0.20426085 -0.33228143
#BIO01 -0.4748812 -0.17933089  0.19349102  0.10961888  0.53456905  0.56515502 -0.29615697
#BIO12  0.4223270  0.10667383 -0.14371361 -0.08980833  0.05309075  0.69204553  0.54753616
#pHc   -0.3920292 -0.12326486 -0.86965923 -0.23559039 -0.11604940  0.07324478 -0.02183197
#TWI   -0.2596671  0.92303035 -0.09097507  0.26316391  0.05079534  0.01504043  0.01580855
#BIO05 -0.3061712 -0.09874431  0.05032799 -0.05321886  0.49102363 -0.39024916  0.70551045
#AVP    0.1480262 -0.24869038 -0.28920552  0.90809235  0.04787695 -0.04544093  0.06010593

EO.PCs.gf <- EO.PCA$x # Output for ensemble model generation

summary(EO.PCA)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1     PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6     PC7
#Standard deviation     0.01759 0.00806 0.005458 0.004561 0.003328 0.001705 0.00167
#Proportion of Variance 0.70043 0.14706 0.067440 0.047110 0.025070 0.006580 0.00631
#Cumulative Proportion  0.70043 0.84748 0.914920 0.962030 0.987100 0.993690 1.00000

EO.a1 <- EO.PCA$x[, 1]
EO.a2 <- EO.PCA$x[, 2]
EO.a3 <- EO.PCA$x[, 3]
EO.r <- EO.a1 + EO.a2
EO.g <- -EO.a2
EO.b <- EO.a3 + EO.a2 - EO.a1
# Scale colors
EO.r <- (EO.r - min(EO.r))/(max(EO.r) - min(EO.r)) * 255
EO.g <- (EO.g - min(EO.g))/(max(EO.g) - min(EO.g)) * 255
EO.b <- (EO.b - min(EO.b))/(max(EO.b) - min(EO.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (EO.PCA biplot)
EO.nvs <- dim(EO.PCA$rotation)[1]
EO.vec <- euc.vars
EO.lv <- length(EO.vec)
EO.vind <- rownames(EO.PCA$rotation) %in% EO.vec
scal <- 20
EO.xrng <- range(EO.PCA$x[, 1], EO.PCA$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
EO.yrng <- range(EO.PCA$x[, 2], EO.PCA$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
EO.trns_site <- predict(euc.BP.lfmm.GF)
EO.PCA.sites <- predict(EO.PCA, EO.trns_site[, euc.vars])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(EO.PCA.sites, file="EO.PCA.sites.csv")
EO.PCA.sites_names <- read.csv("EO.PCA.sites.csv")

#tiff("EO_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("EO_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("EO_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_3.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((EO.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EO.xrng, ylim = EO.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (70%)", ylab = "PC2 (15%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EO.r, EO.g, EO.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="grey70")
arrows(rep(0, EO.lv), rep(0, EO.lv), 
       EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 1]/scal, 
       EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.2, lwd = 5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EO.lv), rep(0, EO.lv), 
       EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 1]/scal, 
       EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#E7F4FF","#EFB6D6","#4292C6","#43BA8F","#B78560","#CC79A7","#B7B7B7"))
points(EO.PCA.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           19,
                                           19,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 1, cex = 1.5, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 1]/scal + jit * sign(EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 1]), 
     EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 2]/scal + jit * sign(EO.PCA$rotation[EO.vec, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = EO.vec,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(EO.PCA.sites_names[, 3], 
#EO.PCA.sites_names[, 4], 
#EO.PCA.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *EO.PCA is remvoing NAs, so the EO.vector is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
EO.pcs <- as.data.frame(EO.PCA$x)
EO.pcs$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
EO.pcs <- merge(EO.pcs, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
EO.pcs$r <- EO.pcs$PC1 + EO.pcs$PC2
EO.pcs$g <- -EO.pcs$PC2
EO.pcs$b <- EO.pcs$PC3 + EO.pcs$PC2 - EO.pcs$PC1
EO.pcs$r <- (EO.pcs$r - min(EO.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.pcs$g <- (EO.pcs$g - min(EO.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.pcs$b <- (EO.pcs$b - min(EO.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.raster.r <- EO.raster.g <- EO.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(EO.raster.r) <- EO.pcs$r
values(EO.raster.g) <- EO.pcs$g
values(EO.raster.b) <- EO.pcs$b
EO.rgbmap <- stack(EO.raster.r, EO.raster.g, EO.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}

EO.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EO/EO_coords_Ch2.csv")

#Adaptive (four env)----
##load GF object (euc.BP.lfmm.GF.vif) 

load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EO/vif/EO_GF_BP_LF_VIF.RData") 

#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biologieuc space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward ProEOustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only eucculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
euc.vars.vif <- names(importance(euc.BP.lfmm.GF.vif))
EO.grid.pre.vif <- predict(euc.BP.lfmm.GF.vif, Env.stack.3.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid), euc.vars.vif]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# EO.PCA.vif of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
EO.PCA.vif <- prcomp(na.omit(EO.grid.pre.vif), center=TRUE, seuce.=FALSE)
save(EO.PCA.vif, file="EO.PCA.vif.RData")
EO.pcs.vif.full.gf.vif <- EO.PCA.vif # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=4):
#  [1] 0.024556766 0.015705245 0.012941242 0.006311516

#Rotation (n x k) = (4 x 4):
#             PC1        PC2         PC3          PC4
#TWI   -0.6764027 -0.5592220 -0.47931534 -0.002655031
#pHc   -0.4987280  0.7350282 -0.15136486 -0.433696531
#BIO05 -0.3193644  0.3219872  0.07009495  0.888491596
#AVP    0.4378998  0.2081552 -0.86164504  0.149943169

summary(EO.PCA.vif)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1     PC2     PC3      PC4
#Standard deviation     0.02456 0.01571 0.01294 0.006312
#Proportion of Variance 0.57052 0.23335 0.15844 0.037690
#Cumulative Proportion  0.57052 0.80387 0.96231 1.000000

EO.a1.vif <- EO.PCA.vif$x[, 1]
EO.a2.vif <- EO.PCA.vif$x[, 2]
EO.a3.vif <- EO.PCA.vif$x[, 3]
EO.r.vif <- EO.a1.vif + EO.a2.vif
EO.g.vif <- -EO.a2.vif
EO.b.vif <- EO.a3.vif + EO.a2.vif - EO.a1.vif
# Seuce colors
EO.r.vif <- (EO.r.vif - min(EO.r.vif))/(max(EO.r.vif) - min(EO.r.vif)) * 255
EO.g.vif <- (EO.g.vif - min(EO.g.vif))/(max(EO.g.vif) - min(EO.g.vif)) * 255
EO.b.vif <- (EO.b.vif - min(EO.b.vif))/(max(EO.b.vif) - min(EO.b.vif)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (EO.PCA.vif biplot)
EO.nvs.vif <- dim(EO.PCA.vif$rotation)[1]
EO.vec.vif <- euc.vars.vif
EO.lv.vif <- length(EO.vec.vif)
EO.vind.vif <- rownames(EO.PCA.vif$rotation) %in% EO.vec.vif
seuc <- 20
EO.xrng.vif <- range(EO.PCA.vif$x[, 1], EO.PCA.vif$rotation[, 1]/seuc) * 1.1
EO.yrng.vif <- range(EO.PCA.vif$x[, 2], EO.PCA.vif$rotation[, 2]/seuc) * 1.1
EO.trns_site.vif <- predict(euc.BP.lfmm.GF.vif)
EO.PCA.vif.sites <- predict(EO.PCA.vif, EO.trns_site.vif[, euc.vars.vif])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(EO.PCA.vif.sites, file="EO.PCA.vif.sites.csv")
EO.PCA.vif.sites_names <- read.csv("EO.PCA.vif.sites.csv") 

#tiff("EO_Biplot_biologieuc_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("EO_Biplot_biologieuc_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("EO_Biplot_biologieuc_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((EO.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EO.xrng.vif, ylim = EO.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (57%)", ylab = "PC2 (23%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EO.r.vif, EO.g.vif, EO.b.vif, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="white")
#rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
#par(new = TRUE)
#plot((EO.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EO.xrng.vif, ylim = EO.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (57%)", ylab = "PC2 (23%)", 
#     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EO.r, EO.g, EO.b, max = 255), 
#     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
#abline(h = 0, v = 0, col = "grey70", lwd = 1)
#axis(1, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0) 
#axis(2, pos = 0, col = "grey70", labels = F, tck = 0)
points(EO.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           9,
                                           9,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = NA, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EO.lv.vif), rep(0, EO.lv.vif), 
       EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 1]/seuc, 
       EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 2]/seuc, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EO.lv.vif), rep(0, EO.lv.vif), 
       EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 1]/seuc, 
       EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 2]/seuc, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B78560","#43BA8F","#CC79A7","#B7B7B7"))
text(EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 1]/seuc + jit * sign(EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 1]), 
     EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 2]/seuc + jit * sign(EO.PCA.vif$rotation[EO.vec.vif, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = EO.vec.vif,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(EO.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 3], 
#EO.PCA.vif.sites_names[, 4], 
#EO.PCA.vif.sites_names$Pop ,
#col.background=rgb(0,0,0,0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *EO.PCA.vif is remvoing NAs, so the EO.vec.viftor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.3.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.3.grid)
Env.stack.3.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid)
EO.pcs.vif <- as.data.frame(EO.PCA.vif$x)
EO.pcs.vif$x <- Env.stack.3.grid$x[Env.stack.3.grid$nas]
EO.pcs.vif <- merge(EO.pcs.vif, Env.stack.3.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
EO.pcs.vif$r <- EO.pcs.vif$PC1 + EO.pcs.vif$PC2
EO.pcs.vif$g <- -EO.pcs.vif$PC2
EO.pcs.vif$b <- EO.pcs.vif$PC3 + EO.pcs.vif$PC2 - EO.pcs.vif$PC1
EO.pcs.vif$r <- (EO.pcs.vif$r - min(EO.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.pcs.vif$g <- (EO.pcs.vif$g - min(EO.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.pcs.vif$b <- (EO.pcs.vif$b - min(EO.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.raster.r.vif <- EO.raster.g.vif <- EO.raster.b.vif <- Env.stack.3[[1]]
values(EO.raster.r.vif) <- EO.pcs.vif$r
values(EO.raster.g.vif) <- EO.pcs.vif$g
values(EO.raster.b.vif) <- EO.pcs.vif$b
EO.rgbmap.vif <- stack(EO.raster.r.vif, EO.raster.g.vif, EO.raster.b.vif)

###Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition----
#Load geo coords
EO.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EO/EO_coords_Ch2.csv")

dev.off()

EO.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EO/EO_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

EO.coords.shp$Pop <- factor(
  EO.coords.shp$Pop,
  levels = unique(EO.coords.shp$Pop))

EO.rgbmap.vif.spat <- rast(EO.rgbmap.vif)

ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster_rgb(data = EO.rgbmap.vif.spat) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  
  geom_point(data = EO.coords.shp, aes(x = lon, y = lat, shape = Pop),
             size = 10, colour = "black", fill = "white",stroke = 1.5) +

                                23,

                                25,
                                25,
                                22,
                                22)) +  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

ggsave(file = "EO_GF_map_vif.pdf", width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)

save(EO.rgbmap.vif, file="EO.rgbmap.vif.Rdata")

#Neutral----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
euc.vars.neu <- names(importance(euc.BP.lfmm.GF.neu))
EO.neu.grid.pre.neu <- predict(euc.BP.lfmm.GF.neu, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), euc.vars.neu]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# EO.PCA.neu of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
EO.PCA.neu <- prcomp(na.omit(EO.neu.grid.pre.neu), center=TRUE, seuce.=FALSE)
summary(EO.PCA.neu)

#Importance of components:
#                            PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.00985 0.005286 0.002225 0.001892 0.001493 0.001025 0.0005948
#Proportion of Variance 0.70750 0.203790 0.036100 0.026110 0.016260 0.007660 0.0025800
#Cumulative Proportion  0.70750 0.911290 0.947390 0.973500 0.989760 0.997420 1.0000000

EO.a1.neu<- EO.PCA.neu$x[, 1]
EO.a2.neu <- EO.PCA.neu$x[, 2]
EO.a3.neu <- EO.PCA.neu$x[, 3]
EO.neu.r <- EO.a1.neu+ EO.a2.neu
EO.neu.g <- -EO.a2.neu
EO.neu.b <- EO.a3.neu + EO.a2.neu - EO.a1.neu
# Seuce colors
EO.neu.r <- (EO.neu.r - min(EO.neu.r))/(max(EO.neu.r) - min(EO.neu.r)) * 255
EO.neu.g <- (EO.neu.g - min(EO.neu.g))/(max(EO.neu.g) - min(EO.neu.g)) * 255
EO.neu.b <- (EO.neu.b - min(EO.neu.b))/(max(EO.neu.b) - min(EO.neu.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (EO.PCA.neu biplot)
EO.nvs.neu <- dim(EO.PCA.neu$rotation)[1]
EO.vec.neu <- euc.vars.neu
EO.lv.neu <- length(EO.vec.neu)
EO.vind.neu <- rownames(EO.PCA.neu$rotation) %in% EO.vec.neu
seuc <- 31
EO.xrng.neu <- range(EO.PCA.neu$x[, 1], EO.PCA.neu$rotation[, 1]/seuc) * 1.1
EO.yrng.neu <- range(EO.PCA.neu$x[, 2], EO.PCA.neu$rotation[, 2]/seuc) * 1.1
EO.trns_site.neu <- predict(euc.BP.lfmm.GF.neu)
EO.PCA.neu.sites <- predict(EO.PCA.neu, EO.trns_site.neu[, euc.vars.neu])
jit <- 0.001

write.csv(EO.PCA.neu.sites, file="EO.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 
EO.PCA.neu.sites_names <- read.csv("EO.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 

knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)
tiff("EO_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_N_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(4.3, 4.5, 0.5, 0.5))
plot((EO.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = EO.xrng.neu, ylim = EO.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (71%)", ylab = "PC2 (20%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EO.neu.r, EO.neu.g, EO.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)

     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(EO.neu.r, EO.neu.g, EO.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)

       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 1]/scal + jit * sign(EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 1]), 
     EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 2]/scal + jit * sign(EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
arrows(rep(0, EO.lv.neu), rep(0, EO.lv.neu), 
       EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 4, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, EO.lv.neu), rep(0, EO.lv.neu), 
       EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       EO.PCA.neu$rotation[EO.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B7B7B7","#4292C6","#E7F4FF","#43BA8F","#CC79A7","#EFB6D6","#B78560"))
# Light gray background
addTextLabels(EO.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3], 
              EO.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 4], 
              EO.PCA.neu.sites_names$Pop ,
              col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
              cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *EO.PCA.neu is remvoing NAs, so the EO.vec.neutor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
EO.pcs.neu <- as.data.frame(EO.PCA.neu$x)
EO.pcs.neu$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
EO.pcs.neu <- merge(EO.pcs.neu, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
EO.pcs.neu$r <- EO.pcs.neu$PC1 + EO.pcs.neu$PC2
EO.pcs.neu$g <- -EO.pcs.neu$PC2
EO.pcs.neu$b <- EO.pcs.neu$PC3 + EO.pcs.neu$PC2 - EO.pcs.neu$PC1
EO.pcs.neu$r <- (EO.pcs.neu$r - min(EO.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.pcs.neu$g <- (EO.pcs.neu$g - min(EO.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.pcs.neu$b <- (EO.pcs.neu$b - min(EO.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(EO.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(EO.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
EO.neu.raster.r <- EO.neu.raster.g <- EO.neu.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(EO.neu.raster.r) <- EO.pcs.neu$r
values(EO.neu.raster.g) <- EO.pcs.neu$g
values(EO.neu.raster.b) <- EO.pcs.neu$b
EO.neu.rgbmap <- stack(EO.neu.raster.r, EO.neu.raster.g, EO.neu.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
EO.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/EO/EO_coords_Ch2.csv")

dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

EO.tm <- 
  tm_shape(EO.neu.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+

tmap_save(EO.tm, filename = "EO_GF_map_N_labels.tiff", dpi=600)


save(EO.neu.rgbmap, file="EO.neu.rgbmap.Rdata")
```

```{r Grevillea- PCA}

##Adaptive----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
gre.vars <- names(importance(gre.BP.lfmm.GF))
GA.grid.pre <- predict(gre.BP.lfmm.GF, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), gre.vars]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# GA.PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
GA.PCA <- prcomp(na.omit(GA.grid.pre), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(GA.PCA, file="GA.PCA.RData")
GA.PCs.full.gf <- GA.PCA # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=7):
#[1] 0.0110696313 0.0072740488 0.0039633161 0.0035364730 0.0017430527 0.0009249768 0.0006982763

#Rotation (n x k) = (7 x 7):
#             PC1         PC2         PC3         PC4          PC5          PC6         PC7
#AVP    0.7034477 -0.68753585 -0.15592517 -0.08905825  0.006509658 -0.004617770  0.01217057
#TWI   -0.2250057 -0.01831481 -0.96898572  0.06554684  0.070551216 -0.026242539 -0.01188044
#BIO12  0.3195885  0.28911633 -0.02229475  0.34584282  0.132685668 -0.779995531 -0.26109784
#BIO14  0.2887956  0.25548132 -0.01229228  0.33807905  0.677612113  0.515377836 -0.11002448
#BIO05 -0.2625705 -0.24397139  0.10205068 -0.23608989  0.670074957 -0.352822672  0.48155750
#pHc   -0.3603346 -0.50181272  0.14197186  0.77126280 -0.048941437  0.006035136 -0.03014884
#BIO01 -0.2649714 -0.25838348  0.07440096 -0.32137641  0.258497147 -0.027611634 -0.82862940

GA.PCs.gf <- GA.PCA$x # Output for ensemble model generation

summary(GA.PCA)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.01107 0.007274 0.003963 0.003536 0.001743 0.000925 0.0006983
#Proportion of Variance 0.58899 0.254330 0.075500 0.060120 0.014600 0.004110 0.0023400
#Cumulative Proportion  0.58899 0.843320 0.918820 0.978940 0.993540 0.997660 1.0000000

GA.a1 <- GA.PCA$x[, 1]
GA.a2 <- GA.PCA$x[, 2]
GA.a3 <- GA.PCA$x[, 3]
GA.r <- GA.a1 + GA.a2
GA.g <- -GA.a2
GA.b <- GA.a3 + GA.a2 - GA.a1
# Scale colors
GA.r <- (GA.r - min(GA.r))/(max(GA.r) - min(GA.r)) * 255
GA.g <- (GA.g - min(GA.g))/(max(GA.g) - min(GA.g)) * 255
GA.b <- (GA.b - min(GA.b))/(max(GA.b) - min(GA.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (GA.PCA biplot)
GA.nvs <- dim(GA.PCA$rotation)[1]
GA.vec <- gre.vars
GA.lv <- length(GA.vec)
GA.vind <- rownames(GA.PCA$rotation) %in% GA.vec
scal <- 20
GA.xrng <- range(GA.PCA$x[, 1], GA.PCA$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
GA.yrng <- range(GA.PCA$x[, 2], GA.PCA$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
GA.trns_site <- predict(gre.BP.lfmm.GF)
GA.PCA.sites <- predict(GA.PCA, GA.trns_site[, gre.vars])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(GA.PCA.sites, file="GA.PCA.sites.csv")
GA.PCA.sites_names <- read.csv("GA.PCA.sites.csv")

#tiff("GA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("GA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("GA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_3.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0))
plot((GA.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = GA.xrng, ylim = GA.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (59%)", ylab = "PC2 (25%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(GA.r, GA.g, GA.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="grey70")
arrows(rep(0, GA.lv), rep(0, GA.lv), 
       GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 1]/scal, 
       GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.2, lwd = 5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, GA.lv), rep(0, GA.lv), 
       GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 1]/scal, 
       GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B7B7B7","#B78560","#4292C6","#E7F4FF","#CC79A7","#43BA8F","#EFB6D6"))
points(GA.PCA.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           22,

                                           23,

                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 1, cex = 1.5, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 1]/scal + jit * sign(GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 1]), 
     GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 2]/scal + jit * sign(GA.PCA$rotation[GA.vec, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = GA.vec,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)

#addTextLabels(GA.PCA.sites_names[, 3], 
#GA.PCA.sites_names[, 4],

dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *GA.PCA is remvoing NAs, so the GA.vector is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
GA.pcs <- as.data.frame(GA.PCA$x)
GA.pcs$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
GA.pcs <- merge(GA.pcs, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
GA.pcs$r <- GA.pcs$PC1 + GA.pcs$PC2
GA.pcs$g <- -GA.pcs$PC2
GA.pcs$b <- GA.pcs$PC3 + GA.pcs$PC2 - GA.pcs$PC1
GA.pcs$r <- (GA.pcs$r - min(GA.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.pcs$g <- (GA.pcs$g - min(GA.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.pcs$b <- (GA.pcs$b - min(GA.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.raster.r <- GA.raster.g <- GA.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(GA.raster.r) <- GA.pcs$r
values(GA.raster.g) <- GA.pcs$g
values(GA.raster.b) <- GA.pcs$b
GA.rgbmap <- stack(GA.raster.r, GA.raster.g, GA.raster.b)


#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
GA.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/GA/GA_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("GA_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(GA.rgbmap)
points(GA.coords$lon, GA.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

GA.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/GA/GA_coords_Ch2.shp")

                        24,

             border.col="black",

             border.lwd=3,

          size = 2, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = F)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+

##load GF object (gre.BP.lfmm.GF.vif) 

load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/GA/vif/GA_GF_BP_LF_VIF.RData") 

#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biologigre space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward ProGAustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only greculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
gre.vars.vif <- names(importance(gre.BP.lfmm.GF.vif))
GA.grid.pre.vif <- predict(gre.BP.lfmm.GF.vif, Env.stack.3.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid), gre.vars.vif]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# GA.PCA.vif of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
GA.PCA.vif <- prcomp(na.omit(GA.grid.pre.vif), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(GA.PCA.vif, file="GA.PCA.vif.RData")
GA.pcs.vif.full.gf.vif <- GA.PCA.vif # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=4):
#  [1] 0.014744988 0.010031450 0.005660944 0.004007094

#Rotation (n x k) = (4 x 4):
#             PC1         PC2         PC3         PC4
#AVP    0.8420279 -0.50386179 -0.16878209 -0.09287060
#TWI   -0.2410700 -0.08576805 -0.96606432  0.03533836
#pHc   -0.3742612 -0.77379302  0.17959229  0.47845538
#BIO05 -0.3046356 -0.37418111  0.07732362 -0.87247160

summary(GA.PCA.vif)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1     PC2      PC3      PC4
#Standard deviation     0.01474 0.01003 0.005661 0.004007
#Proportion of Variance 0.59379 0.27483 0.087520 0.043850
#Cumulative Proportion  0.59379 0.86862 0.956150 1.000000

GA.a1.vif <- GA.PCA.vif$x[, 1]
GA.a2.vif <- GA.PCA.vif$x[, 2]
GA.a3.vif <- GA.PCA.vif$x[, 3]
GA.r.vif <- GA.a1.vif + GA.a2.vif
GA.g.vif <- -GA.a2.vif
GA.b.vif <- GA.a3.vif + GA.a2.vif - GA.a1.vif
# scale colors
GA.r.vif <- (GA.r.vif - min(GA.r.vif))/(max(GA.r.vif) - min(GA.r.vif)) * 255
GA.g.vif <- (GA.g.vif - min(GA.g.vif))/(max(GA.g.vif) - min(GA.g.vif)) * 255
GA.b.vif <- (GA.b.vif - min(GA.b.vif))/(max(GA.b.vif) - min(GA.b.vif)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (GA.PCA.vif biplot)
GA.nvs.vif <- dim(GA.PCA.vif$rotation)[1]
GA.vec.vif <- gre.vars.vif
GA.lv.vif <- length(GA.vec.vif)
GA.vind.vif <- rownames(GA.PCA.vif$rotation) %in% GA.vec.vif
scal <- 20
GA.xrng.vif <- range(GA.PCA.vif$x[, 1], GA.PCA.vif$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
GA.yrng.vif <- range(GA.PCA.vif$x[, 2], GA.PCA.vif$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
GA.trns_site.vif <- predict(gre.BP.lfmm.GF.vif)
GA.PCA.vif.sites <- predict(GA.PCA.vif, GA.trns_site.vif[, gre.vars.vif])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(GA.PCA.vif.sites, file="GA.PCA.vif.sites.csv")
GA.PCA.vif.sites_names <- read.csv("GA.PCA.vif.sites.csv") 

#tiff("GA_Biplot_biologigre_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)

tiff("GA_Biplot_biologigre_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vif.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((GA.PCA.vif$x[, 1:2]), xlim = GA.xrng.vif, ylim = GA.yrng.vif, xlab = "PC1 (59%)", ylab = "PC2 (27%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(GA.r.vif, GA.g.vif, GA.b.vif, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="white")

       bg = NA, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, GA.lv.vif), rep(0, GA.lv.vif), 
       GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 1]/scal, 
       GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, GA.lv.vif), rep(0, GA.lv.vif), 
       GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 1]/scal, 
       GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B7B7B7","#B78560","#43BA8F","#CC79A7"))
text(GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 1]/scal + jit * sign(GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 1]), 
     GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 2]/scal + jit * sign(GA.PCA.vif$rotation[GA.vec.vif, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = GA.vec.vif,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)

#col.background=rgb(0,0,0,0.75),
#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *GA.PCA.vif is remvoing NAs, so the GA.vec.viftor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.3.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.3.grid)
Env.stack.3.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid)
GA.pcs.vif <- as.data.frame(GA.PCA.vif$x)
GA.pcs.vif$x <- Env.stack.3.grid$x[Env.stack.3.grid$nas]
GA.pcs.vif <- merge(GA.pcs.vif, Env.stack.3.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
GA.pcs.vif$r <- GA.pcs.vif$PC1 + GA.pcs.vif$PC2
GA.pcs.vif$g <- -GA.pcs.vif$PC2
GA.pcs.vif$b <- GA.pcs.vif$PC3 + GA.pcs.vif$PC2 - GA.pcs.vif$PC1
GA.pcs.vif$r <- (GA.pcs.vif$r - min(GA.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.pcs.vif$g <- (GA.pcs.vif$g - min(GA.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.pcs.vif$b <- (GA.pcs.vif$b - min(GA.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.raster.r.vif <- GA.raster.g.vif <- GA.raster.b.vif <- Env.stack.3[[1]]
values(GA.raster.r.vif) <- GA.pcs.vif$r
values(GA.raster.g.vif) <- GA.pcs.vif$g
values(GA.raster.b.vif) <- GA.pcs.vif$b
GA.rgbmap.vif <- stack(GA.raster.r.vif, GA.raster.g.vif, GA.raster.b.vif)

GA.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/GA/GA_coords_Ch2.csv")

plotRGB(GA.rgbmap.vif)
points(GA.coords$lon, GA.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

GA.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/GA/GA_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

GA.coords.shp$Pop <- factor(
  GA.coords.shp$Pop,
  levels = unique(GA.coords.shp$Pop)
)

GA.rgbmap.vif.spat <- rast(GA.rgbmap.vif)

ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster_rgb(data = GA.rgbmap.vif.spat) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  
  geom_point(data = GA.coords.shp, aes(x = lon, y = lat, shape = Pop),
             size = 10, colour = "black", fill = "white",stroke = 1.5) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(25,

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

#Neutral----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
gre.vars.neu <- names(importance(gre.BP.lfmm.GF.neu))
GA.neu.grid.pre.neu <- predict(gre.BP.lfmm.GF.neu, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), gre.vars.neu]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# GA.PCA.neu of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
GA.PCA.neu <- prcomp(na.omit(GA.neu.grid.pre.neu), center=TRUE, scale=FALSE)
summary(GA.PCA.neu)

#Importance of components:
#                            PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.009017 0.003222 0.002774 0.002271 0.002142 0.001181 0.0008596
#Proportion of Variance 0.730760 0.093320 0.069160 0.046340 0.041240 0.012530 0.0066400
#Cumulative Proportion  0.730760 0.824090 0.893240 0.939590 0.980830 0.993360 1.0000000

GA.a1.neu<- GA.PCA.neu$x[, 1]
GA.a2.neu <- GA.PCA.neu$x[, 2]
GA.a3.neu <- GA.PCA.neu$x[, 3]
GA.neu.r <- GA.a1.neu+ GA.a2.neu
GA.neu.g <- -GA.a2.neu
GA.neu.b <- GA.a3.neu + GA.a2.neu - GA.a1.neu
# scale colors
GA.neu.r <- (GA.neu.r - min(GA.neu.r))/(max(GA.neu.r) - min(GA.neu.r)) * 255
GA.neu.g <- (GA.neu.g - min(GA.neu.g))/(max(GA.neu.g) - min(GA.neu.g)) * 255
GA.neu.b <- (GA.neu.b - min(GA.neu.b))/(max(GA.neu.b) - min(GA.neu.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (GA.PCA.neu biplot)
GA.nvs.neu <- dim(GA.PCA.neu$rotation)[1]
GA.vec.neu <- gre.vars.neu
GA.lv.neu <- length(GA.vec.neu)
GA.vind.neu <- rownames(GA.PCA.neu$rotation) %in% GA.vec.neu
scal <- 40
GA.xrng.neu <- range(GA.PCA.neu$x[, 1], GA.PCA.neu$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
GA.yrng.neu <- range(GA.PCA.neu$x[, 2], GA.PCA.neu$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
GA.trns_site.neu <- predict(gre.BP.lfmm.GF.neu)
GA.PCA.neu.sites <- predict(GA.PCA.neu, GA.trns_site.neu[, gre.vars.neu])
jit <- 0.001

write.csv(GA.PCA.neu.sites, file="GA.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 
GA.PCA.neu.sites_names <- read.csv("GA.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 

knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)
tiff("GA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_N.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(4.3, 4.5, 0.5, 0.5))
plot((GA.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = GA.xrng.neu, ylim = GA.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (73%)", ylab = "PC2 (9%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(GA.neu.r, GA.neu.g, GA.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3],par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4])
par(new = TRUE)
plot((GA.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = GA.xrng.neu, ylim = GA.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (73%)", ylab = "PC2 (9%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(GA.neu.r, GA.neu.g, GA.neu.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 2, cex.axis = 1)
points(GA.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                               24,
                                               22,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               21,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               23,
                                               22,
                                               23,
                                               22,
                                               23,
                                               23,
                                               19,
                                               19,
                                               23,
                                               21,
                                               21,
                                               21,
                                               22,
                                               25,
                                               23,
                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               25,
                                               25,
                                               22,
                                               22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 1]/scal + jit * sign(GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 1]), 
     GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 2]/scal + jit * sign(GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
arrows(rep(0, GA.lv.neu), rep(0, GA.lv.neu), 
       GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 4, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, GA.lv.neu), rep(0, GA.lv.neu), 
       GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 1]/scal, 
       GA.PCA.neu$rotation[GA.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 2.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#EFB6D6","#CC79A7","#E7F4FF","#4292C6","#43BA8F","#B78560","#B7B7B7"))
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(GA.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 3], 
#              GA.PCA.neu.sites_names[, 4], 
#              GA.PCA.neu.sites_names$Pop ,
#              col.background=rgb(0,0,0, 0.75),
#              cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *GA.PCA.neu is remvoing NAs, so the GA.vec.neutor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
GA.pcs.neu <- as.data.frame(GA.PCA.neu$x)
GA.pcs.neu$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
GA.pcs.neu <- merge(GA.pcs.neu, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
GA.pcs.neu$r <- GA.pcs.neu$PC1 + GA.pcs.neu$PC2
GA.pcs.neu$g <- -GA.pcs.neu$PC2
GA.pcs.neu$b <- GA.pcs.neu$PC3 + GA.pcs.neu$PC2 - GA.pcs.neu$PC1
GA.pcs.neu$r <- (GA.pcs.neu$r - min(GA.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.pcs.neu$g <- (GA.pcs.neu$g - min(GA.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.pcs.neu$b <- (GA.pcs.neu$b - min(GA.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(GA.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(GA.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
GA.neu.raster.r <- GA.neu.raster.g <- GA.neu.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(GA.neu.raster.r) <- GA.pcs.neu$r
values(GA.neu.raster.g) <- GA.pcs.neu$g
values(GA.neu.raster.b) <- GA.pcs.neu$b
GA.neu.rgbmap <- stack(GA.neu.raster.r, GA.neu.raster.g, GA.neu.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
GA.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/GA/GA_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("GA_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF_N.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)
plotRGB(GA.neu.rgbmap)
points(GA.coords$lon, GA.coords$lat,pch = 21, lwd = 1.5, cex = 1, bg = "white")
dev.off()

GA.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/GA/GA_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh.shp")

hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills.tif")

dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

tmap_mode("plot")
GA.tm <- 
  tm_shape(GA.neu.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+
  tm_rgb()+
  tm_grid(labels.size = 1, lines = FALSE, col = "white", labels.col = "white")+
  tm_xlab("Longitude", size = 2)+
  tm_ylab("Latitude", size = 2)+
  tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(GA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = c(25,
                        24,
                        22,
                        24,
                        24,
                        21,
                        24,
                        24,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        22,
                        23,
                        23,

                        23,

                        24,

                        22,
                        22),
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=2,
             size = 0.4)+
  #tm_text("Pop", just = "top", col = "white", bg.color = "black",
  #        size = 0.8, auto.placement = 0.25, shadow = T)+
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = FALSE)+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05), frame=FALSE)
tmap_save(GA.tm, filename = "GA_GF_map_N_labels.tiff", dpi=600)


save(GA.neu.rgbmap, file="GA.neu.rgbmap.Rdata")
```

```{r Xanthorrhoea- PCA}

##Adaptive----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
xan.vars <- names(importance(xan.BP.lfmm.GF))
XA.grid.pre <- predict(xan.BP.lfmm.GF, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), xan.vars]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# XA.PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
XA.PCA <- prcomp(na.omit(XA.grid.pre), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(XA.PCA, file="XA.PCA.RData")
XA.PCs.full.gf <- XA.PCA # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=7):
#[1] 0.0136058482 0.0078893257 0.0072972282 0.0038769528 0.0022574113 0.0010268734 0.0005076346

#Rotation (n x k) = (7 x 7):
#             PC1        PC2         PC3          PC4         PC5          PC6          PC7
#TWI    0.4852049 -0.7145119  0.50205882  0.004904785  0.04220772 -0.013311734 -0.001780371
#AVP   -0.5105151  0.2277228  0.81492891  0.152305285  0.01236835 -0.001281842  0.007483778
#BIO05  0.3469769  0.3219369  0.05887358  0.289293346  0.66922963 -0.241174457  0.427520222
#BIO01  0.3351989  0.2887322  0.07501081  0.323559959  0.09984502  0.094755646 -0.821589960
#pHc    0.3509582  0.4097570  0.25582037 -0.800418003 -0.05103036 -0.008372185 -0.011844723
#BIO12 -0.2976900 -0.2219491 -0.07574069 -0.278077381  0.35425269 -0.725575158 -0.356512713
#BIO14 -0.2437382 -0.1828749 -0.05961862 -0.265332522  0.64197285  0.637297419 -0.122129470

XA.PCs.gf <- XA.PCA$x # Output for ensemble model generation

summary(XA.PCA)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.01361 0.007889 0.007297 0.003877 0.002257 0.001027 0.0005076
#Proportion of Variance 0.57482 0.193270 0.165350 0.046670 0.015820 0.003270 0.0008000
#Cumulative Proportion  0.57482 0.768080 0.933430 0.980100 0.995930 0.999200 1.0000000

XA.a1 <- XA.PCA$x[, 1]
XA.a2 <- XA.PCA$x[, 2]
XA.a3 <- XA.PCA$x[, 3]
XA.r <- XA.a1 + XA.a2
XA.g <- -XA.a2
XA.b <- XA.a3 + XA.a2 - XA.a1
# Scale colors
XA.r <- (XA.r - min(XA.r))/(max(XA.r) - min(XA.r)) * 255
XA.g <- (XA.g - min(XA.g))/(max(XA.g) - min(XA.g)) * 255
XA.b <- (XA.b - min(XA.b))/(max(XA.b) - min(XA.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (XA.PCA biplot)
XA.nvs <- dim(XA.PCA$rotation)[1]
XA.vec <- xan.vars
XA.lv <- length(XA.vec)
XA.vind <- rownames(XA.PCA$rotation) %in% XA.vec
scal <- 20
XA.xrng <- range(XA.PCA$x[, 1], XA.PCA$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
XA.yrng <- range(XA.PCA$x[, 2], XA.PCA$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
XA.trns_site <- predict(xan.BP.lfmm.GF)
XA.PCA.sites <- predict(XA.PCA, XA.trns_site[, xan.vars])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(XA.PCA.sites, file="XA.PCA.sites.csv")
XA.PCA.sites_names <- read.csv("XA.PCA.sites.csv")

#tiff("XA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_labels.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
#tiff("XA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_2_vec.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
tiff("XA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_3.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(2, 2, 0.2, 0.5), mgp = c(0, 0, 0)) 
plot((XA.PCA$x[, 1:2]), xlim = XA.xrng, ylim = XA.yrng, xlab = "PC1 (57%)", ylab = "PC2 (19%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(XA.r, XA.g, XA.b, max = 255), 
     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="grey70")
arrows(rep(0, XA.lv), rep(0, XA.lv), 
       XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 1]/scal, 
       XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.2, lwd = 5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, XA.lv), rep(0, XA.lv), 
       XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 1]/scal, 
       XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = c("#B78560","#B7B7B7","#CC79A7","#EFB6D6","#43BA8F","#4292C6","#E7F4FF"))
points(XA.PCA.sites_names[, 3:4],  pch = c(25,
                                           24,
                                           22,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           21,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           22,
                                           23,
                                           23,
                                           19,
                                           19,
                                           23,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           21,
                                           22,
                                           25,
                                           23,
                                           24,
                                           24,
                                           25,
                                           25,
                                           22,
                                           22), lwd = 1, cex = 1.5, 
       bg = c("white"), 
       col = "black")
text(XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 1]/scal + jit * sign(XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 1]), 
     XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 2]/scal + jit * sign(XA.PCA$rotation[XA.vec, 2]), 
     labels = NULL,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
#labels = XA.vec,  cex = 0.5, pos = 2)
# Light gray background
#addTextLabels(XA.PCA.sites_names[, 3], 
#XA.PCA.sites_names[, 4], 
#XA.PCA.sites_names$Pop ,
```
