#cex.label=0.7, col.label="white")
dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *XA.PCA is remvoing NAs, so the XA.vector is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
XA.pcs <- as.data.frame(XA.PCA$x)
XA.pcs$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
XA.pcs <- merge(XA.pcs, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
XA.pcs$r <- XA.pcs$PC1 + XA.pcs$PC2
XA.pcs$g <- -XA.pcs$PC2
XA.pcs$b <- XA.pcs$PC3 + XA.pcs$PC2 - XA.pcs$PC1
XA.pcs$r <- (XA.pcs$r - min(XA.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.pcs$g <- (XA.pcs$g - min(XA.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.pcs$b <- (XA.pcs$b - min(XA.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.raster.r <- XA.raster.g <- XA.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(XA.raster.r) <- XA.pcs$r
values(XA.raster.g) <- XA.pcs$g
values(XA.raster.b) <- XA.pcs$b
XA.rgbmap <- stack(XA.raster.r, XA.raster.g, XA.raster.b)


#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}

#Adaptive (four env)----
##load GF object (xan.BP.lfmm.GF.vif) 

load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/XA/vif/XA_GF_BP_LF_VIF.RData") 

#PCA of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette}

#The multi-dimensional biologixan space can most effectively be represented by taking the principle components of the transformed grid and presenting the first two dimensions in a biplot.

# To allow straightforward ProXAustes superpositioning and generation of ensemble model, I only xanculate the first 8 PCs here. This is perfectly fine because I anyway only visualise the first 3 PCs. 
#Reference: https://github.com/hirzi/RhEA/blob/main/Gradient%20forest%20and%20glacial%20genomic%20offset/GradientForest_GlacialGenomicOffset.R#L361

# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
xan.vars.vif <- names(importance(xan.BP.lfmm.GF.vif))
XA.grid.pre.vif <- predict(xan.BP.lfmm.GF.vif, Env.stack.3.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid), xan.vars.vif]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# XA.PCA.vif of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
XA.PCA.vif <- prcomp(na.omit(XA.grid.pre.vif), center=TRUE, scale.=FALSE)
save(XA.PCA.vif, file="XA.PCA.vif.RData")
XA.pcs.vif.full.gf.vif <- XA.PCA.vif # Output for ensemble model generation
#Standard deviations (1, .., p=4):
#  [1] 0.018842402 0.011470832 0.010728110 0.005109098

#Rotation (n x k) = (4 x 4):
#             PC1        PC2         PC3          PC4
#TWI    0.6133954 -0.6145383 -0.49601909  0.007333358
#BIO05  0.3822248  0.4118318 -0.02533762  0.826835411
#AVP   -0.5448735  0.1144524 -0.81309769  0.169957747
#pHc    0.4251624  0.6630520 -0.30363666 -0.536100540

summary(XA.PCA.vif)
#Importance of components:
#                           PC1     PC2     PC3      PC4
#Standard deviation     0.01884 0.01147 0.01073 0.005109
#Proportion of Variance 0.56551 0.20959 0.18332 0.041580
#Cumulative Proportion  0.56551 0.77510 0.95842 1.000000

XA.a1.vif <- XA.PCA.vif$x[, 1]
XA.a2.vif <- XA.PCA.vif$x[, 2]
XA.a3.vif <- XA.PCA.vif$x[, 3]
XA.r.vif <- XA.a1.vif + XA.a2.vif
XA.g.vif <- -XA.a2.vif
XA.b.vif <- XA.a3.vif + XA.a2.vif - XA.a1.vif
# scale colors
XA.r.vif <- (XA.r.vif - min(XA.r.vif))/(max(XA.r.vif) - min(XA.r.vif)) * 255
XA.g.vif <- (XA.g.vif - min(XA.g.vif))/(max(XA.g.vif) - min(XA.g.vif)) * 255
XA.b.vif <- (XA.b.vif - min(XA.b.vif))/(max(XA.b.vif) - min(XA.b.vif)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (XA.PCA.vif biplot)
XA.nvs.vif <- dim(XA.PCA.vif$rotation)[1]
XA.vec.vif <- xan.vars.vif
XA.lv.vif <- length(XA.vec.vif)
XA.vind.vif <- rownames(XA.PCA.vif$rotation) %in% XA.vec.vif
scal <- 20
XA.xrng.vif <- range(XA.PCA.vif$x[, 1], XA.PCA.vif$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
XA.yrng.vif <- range(XA.PCA.vif$x[, 2], XA.PCA.vif$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
XA.trns_site.vif <- predict(xan.BP.lfmm.GF.vif)
XA.PCA.vif.sites <- predict(XA.PCA.vif, XA.trns_site.vif[, xan.vars.vif])
jit <- 0.001

#write.csv(XA.PCA.vif.sites, file="XA.PCA.vif.sites.csv")
XA.PCA.vif.sites_names <- read.csv("XA.PCA.vif.sites.csv")

     asp = 1, cex.lab = 1.1, cex.axis = 1, frame.plot = FALSE, axes=FALSE, col.lab="white")

       length = 0.1, lwd = 3.5, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")

dev.off()

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *XA.PCA.vif is remvoing NAs, so the XA.vec.viftor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.3.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.3.grid)
Env.stack.3.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.3.grid)
XA.pcs.vif <- as.data.frame(XA.PCA.vif$x)
XA.pcs.vif$x <- Env.stack.3.grid$x[Env.stack.3.grid$nas]
XA.pcs.vif <- merge(XA.pcs.vif, Env.stack.3.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
XA.pcs.vif$r <- XA.pcs.vif$PC1 + XA.pcs.vif$PC2
XA.pcs.vif$g <- -XA.pcs.vif$PC2
XA.pcs.vif$b <- XA.pcs.vif$PC3 + XA.pcs.vif$PC2 - XA.pcs.vif$PC1
XA.pcs.vif$r <- (XA.pcs.vif$r - min(XA.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs.vif$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.pcs.vif$g <- (XA.pcs.vif$g - min(XA.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs.vif$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.pcs.vif$b <- (XA.pcs.vif$b - min(XA.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs.vif$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.raster.r.vif <- XA.raster.g.vif <- XA.raster.b.vif <- Env.stack.3[[1]]
values(XA.raster.r.vif) <- XA.pcs.vif$r
values(XA.raster.g.vif) <- XA.pcs.vif$g
values(XA.raster.b.vif) <- XA.pcs.vif$b
XA.rgbmap.vif <- stack(XA.raster.r.vif, XA.raster.g.vif, XA.raster.b.vif)

###Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition----

  XA.coords.shp$Pop,
  levels = unique(XA.coords.shp$Pop))

  geom_spatraster_rgb(data = XA.rgbmap.vif.spat) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  
  geom_point(data = XA.coords.shp, aes(x = lon, y = lat, shape = Pop),
             size = 10, colour = "black", fill = "white",stroke = 1.5) +

  theme_minimal() +

        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

save(XA.rgbmap.vif, file="XA.rgbmap.vif.Rdata")

#Neutral----
# Transform variables by predicting with GF model
xan.vars.neu <- names(importance(xan.BP.lfmm.GF.neu))
XA.neu.grid.pre.neu <- predict(xan.BP.lfmm.GF.neu, Env.stack.2.grid[complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid), xan.vars.neu]) # need to get rid of NA rows or an error pops up

# XA.PCA.neu of the transformed grid for plotting in RGB palette
XA.PCA.neu <- prcomp(na.omit(XA.neu.grid.pre.neu), center=TRUE, scale=FALSE)
summary(XA.PCA.neu)

#Importance of components:
#                           PC1      PC2      PC3      PC4      PC5      PC6       PC7
#Standard deviation     0.008821 0.004704 0.003731 0.002774 0.001583 0.000746 0.0003685
#Proportion of Variance 0.623680 0.177400 0.111580 0.061700 0.020090 0.004460 0.0010900
#Cumulative Proportion  0.623680 0.801080 0.912670 0.974360 0.994450 0.998910 1.0000000

XA.a1.neu<- XA.PCA.neu$x[, 1]
XA.a2.neu <- XA.PCA.neu$x[, 2]
XA.a3.neu <- XA.PCA.neu$x[, 3]
XA.neu.r <- XA.a1.neu+ XA.a2.neu
XA.neu.g <- -XA.a2.neu
XA.neu.b <- XA.a3.neu + XA.a2.neu - XA.a1.neu
# scale colors
XA.neu.r <- (XA.neu.r - min(XA.neu.r))/(max(XA.neu.r) - min(XA.neu.r)) * 255
XA.neu.g <- (XA.neu.g - min(XA.neu.g))/(max(XA.neu.g) - min(XA.neu.g)) * 255
XA.neu.b <- (XA.neu.b - min(XA.neu.b))/(max(XA.neu.b) - min(XA.neu.b)) * 255

# Plot predicted genetic turnover in genetic space (XA.PCA.neu biplot)
XA.nvs.neu <- dim(XA.PCA.neu$rotation)[1]
XA.vec.neu <- xan.vars.neu
XA.lv.neu <- length(XA.vec.neu)
XA.vind.neu <- rownames(XA.PCA.neu$rotation) %in% XA.vec.neu
scal <- 31
XA.xrng.neu <- range(XA.PCA.neu$x[, 1], XA.PCA.neu$rotation[, 1]/scal) * 1.1
XA.yrng.neu <- range(XA.PCA.neu$x[, 2], XA.PCA.neu$rotation[, 2]/scal) * 1.1
XA.trns_site.neu <- predict(xan.BP.lfmm.GF.neu)
XA.PCA.neu.sites <- predict(XA.PCA.neu, XA.trns_site.neu[, xan.vars.neu])
jit <- 0.001

write.csv(XA.PCA.neu.sites, file="XA.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 
XA.PCA.neu.sites_names <- read.csv("XA.PCA.neu.sites.csv") 

knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)
tiff("XA_Biplot_biological_space_GF_BP_LF_N.tiff", width=1500, height=1300, res=300)
par(mar = c(4.3, 4.5, 0.5, 0.5))
plot((XA.PCA.neu$x[, 1:2]), xlim = XA.xrng.neu, ylim = XA.yrng.neu, xlab = "PC1 (62%)", ylab = "PC2 (18%)", 
     pch = ".", cex = 4, col = rgb(XA.neu.r, XA.neu.g, XA.neu.b, max = 255),

                                               24,

                                               21,

                                               24,
                                               24,
                                               25,

                                               22,
                                               22), lwd = 0.7, cex = 1, 
       bg = c("white"),

arrows(rep(0, XA.lv.neu), rep(0, XA.lv.neu),

       XA.PCA.neu$rotation[XA.vec.neu, 2]/scal, 
       length = 0.1, lwd = 4, angle = 20, 
       col = "black")
arrows(rep(0, XA.lv.neu), rep(0, XA.lv.neu),

       XA.PCA.neu$rotation[XA.vec.neu, 2]/scal,

       col = c("#43BA8F","#B7B7B7","#EFB6D6","#E7F4FF","#B78560","#4292C6","#CC79A7"))

# Plot (map) predicted genetic turnover in geographic space
# *XA.PCA.neu is remvoing NAs, so the XA.vec.neutor is shorter than it should and it's messing up positions. This code introduces back the NA rows in their original positions
Env.stack.2.grid$x <- 1:nrow(Env.stack.2.grid)
Env.stack.2.grid$nas <- complete.cases(Env.stack.2.grid)
XA.pcs.neu <- as.data.frame(XA.PCA.neu$x)
XA.pcs.neu$x <- Env.stack.2.grid$x[Env.stack.2.grid$nas]
XA.pcs.neu <- merge(XA.pcs.neu, Env.stack.2.grid, by = "x", all = TRUE)
XA.pcs.neu$r <- XA.pcs.neu$PC1 + XA.pcs.neu$PC2
XA.pcs.neu$g <- -XA.pcs.neu$PC2
XA.pcs.neu$b <- XA.pcs.neu$PC3 + XA.pcs.neu$PC2 - XA.pcs.neu$PC1
XA.pcs.neu$r <- (XA.pcs.neu$r - min(XA.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs.neu$r, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.pcs.neu$g <- (XA.pcs.neu$g - min(XA.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs.neu$g, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.pcs.neu$b <- (XA.pcs.neu$b - min(XA.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE))/(max(XA.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE) - min(XA.pcs.neu$b, na.rm = TRUE)) * 255
XA.neu.raster.r <- XA.neu.raster.g <- XA.neu.raster.b <- Env.stack.2[[1]]
values(XA.neu.raster.r) <- XA.pcs.neu$r
values(XA.neu.raster.g) <- XA.pcs.neu$g
values(XA.neu.raster.b) <- XA.pcs.neu$b
XA.neu.rgbmap <- stack(XA.neu.raster.r, XA.neu.raster.g, XA.neu.raster.b)

#Map spatial pattern of predicted genomic composition}
#Load geo coords
XA.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/XA/XA_coords_Ch2.csv")

png("XA_Mapping_geographic_space_GF_BP_LF_N.png", width=800, height=1550, res=200)

dev.off()

XA.coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/XA/XA_coords_Ch2.shp")

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh.shp")

hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills.tif")

dem <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/GNP_dem.tif")

tmap_mode("plot")
XA.tm <- 
  tm_shape(XA.neu.rgbmap,  raster.downsample = FALSE)+

tmap_save(XA.tm, filename = "XA_GF_map_N_labels.tiff", dpi=600)


save(XA.neu.rgbmap, file="XA.neu.rgbmap.Rdata")

```{r Genetic Offset}

#Adaptive (seven env)----
BM.OF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/BM/Genetic_Offset/BM.gen.off.tif")
CR.OF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/CR/Genetic_Offset/CR.gen.off.tif")
EI.OF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EI/Genetic_Offset/EI.gen.off.tif")
EO.OF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EO/Genetic_Offset/EO.gen.off.tif")
GA.OF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/GA/Genetic_Offset/GA.gen.off.tif")
XA.OF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/XA/Genetic_Offset/XA.gen.off.tif")

go <- stack(BM.OF, CR.OF, EI.OF, EO.OF, GA.OF, XA.OF)

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

hills <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/DEM_Grampians/hills_UTM.tif ")

Polygon <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_3_DataAnalysis/2_GIS_Toolbox/Maps//Polygon_32754_WGS84_54S.shp")

hills_2 <- crop(hills, Polygon)

#Map----

##Scaled---- 
#Convert to spatraster
BM.OF.spat <- rast(BM.OF)
CR.OF.spat <- rast(CR.OF)
EI.OF.spat <- rast(EI.OF)
EO.OF.spat <- rast(EO.OF)
GA.OF.spat <- rast(GA.OF)
XA.OF.spat <- rast(XA.OF)

#Use the scale() function for SDs
BM.OF_scaled <- scale(BM.OF.spat)
CR.OF_scaled <- scale(CR.OF.spat)
EI.OF_scaled <- scale(EI.OF.spat)
EO.OF_scaled <- scale(EO.OF.spat)
GA.OF_scaled <- scale(GA.OF.spat)
XA.OF_scaled <- scale(XA.OF.spat)

# Add offset values together with mosaic merge in terra
Temp_comb.OF_scaled <- mosaic(BM.OF_scaled, CR.OF_scaled, EI.OF_scaled, fun="sum")
Combined_offset_scaled <- mosaic(Temp_comb.OF_scaled, EO.OF_scaled, GA.OF_scaled, XA.OF_scaled, fun="sum")

coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Geo_coord_all_pops_Ch2.shp")

Spp.coords.shp=st_read("Sampling_locations.shp")

pal <- brewer.pal(n = 10, name = "RdYlBu")

Spp.coords.shp$Elevation <- factor(Spp.coords.shp$Elevation, levels = c("High", "Low"))

ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = Combined_offset_scaled) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  
  #geom_point(data = Spp.coords.shp, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, shape = Elevation),
  #           size = 3, colour = "black", fill = "white") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("High" = 21, "Low" = 1)) +  
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = rev(pal), na.value = "white") +  
  xlab("Longitude") +
  ylab("Latitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.text.position = "bottom",
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
         title = expression(GF[offset]~"(scaled)"),
         label.position = "bottom",
         title.position = "left",
         title.vjust = 0.8,
         frame.colour = "black",
         barwidth = 8,
         barheight = 1.5,
         ticks.colour = "grey30"))

###Banksia----
BM.OF <- 
  tm_shape(BM.OF)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdYlBu", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="GFoffset",
            legend.is.portrait = T) +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=2,
             size = 1,
             legend.shape.show = F,alpha=0.7)+
  tm_shape(gnp) + 
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 0.5)  +
  tm_shape(gnp, col = "black") +
  tm_borders(lwd = 2) +
  tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE,legend.show = T)+
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05),
            legend.position = c(0.02, 0.76),
            #legend.frame = TRUE,
            legend.text.size = 1.2,
            frame = F, title.size =2,
            title="Banksia marginata")

tmap_save(BM.OF, filename = "BM_GO.pdf")

##Scaled----
#Load Elevation
ele <- rast("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/GNP/Re_sized/Topography/Masked/elevation.tif")

coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Geo_coord_all_pops_Ch2.csv")

#Extract Values from Raster
Combined_offset_scaled.ex <- raster::extract(x = Combined_offset_scaled, coords[,c('lon','lat')])
Combined_offset_scaled.ex <- data.frame(Combined_offset_scaled.ex)

Combined_offset_scaled.ele.x <- raster::extract(x = ele, coords[,c('lon','lat')])
Combined_offset_scaled.ele.x <- data.frame(Combined_offset_scaled.ele.x)

Combined_offset_scaled.ex <- cbind(coords, Combined_offset_scaled.ele.x, Combined_offset_scaled.ex)

head(Combined_offset_scaled.ex) 

Combined_offset_scaled.ex <- Combined_offset_scaled.ex[,c(-5,-7)]

head(Combined_offset_scaled.ex) 

colnames(Combined_offset_scaled.ex) <- c("Pop","site_code","lat","lon","ele","GO")
head(Combined_offset_scaled.ex)

write.csv(Combined_offset_scaled.ex, file="Combined_offset_scaled_GO_Scatterplot.csv")

Combined_offset_scaled.ex <- read.csv("Combined_offset_scaled_GO_Scatterplot.csv")

ggplot(Combined_offset_scaled.ex, aes(ele, GO)) +
  geom_point(mapping=aes(size=GO,
                         alpha=0.5,
                         fill=GO),
             colour = "black",
             shape=21) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#5e4fa2", 
                       mid = "#ffffbf", high = "#9e0142", midpoint = 1.86) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  ylab("GFoffset") +
  xlab("Elevation (m)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  #facet_wrap(~Spp) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.position="bottom", legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.text=element_text(size=10, face="plain"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black", 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, 
                                   face = "plain", size=15,
                                   angle = 60),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black", size=15, face="plain")) +
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = ("GFoffset"),
                                label.position = "bottom",
                                title.position = "left", 
                                title.vjust = 0.8,
                                frame.colour = "black",
                                barwidth = 10,
                                barheight = 1.5,
                                label.theme = element_text(angle = 45,vjust = 0.5))) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(label = Pop),
                   color = "black", 
                   fontface = "bold",
                   segment.color = "grey30",
                   segment.size = 1,
                   min.segment.length = 0.1,
                   na.rm = TRUE,
                   show.legend = TRUE,
                   max.overlaps = Inf) + 
  guides(alpha="none", size = "none")

ggsave("Combined_offset_scaled_GO_Scatterplot.pdf", height = 7, width = 7)

##Facet ~Species----

Spp_GO_Scatterplot <- read.csv("Spp_GO_Scatterplot.csv")

# Modify the factor levels (facet labels)
Spp_GO_Scatterplot$Species <- factor(Spp_GO_Scatterplot$Species, levels = c("BM","CR", "EI", "EO", "GA", "XA"), 
                                     labels = c("Banksia","Callitris","Epacris",
                                     "Eucalyptus","Grevillea","Xanthorrhoea"))

ggplot(Spp_GO_Scatterplot, aes(ele, GO)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = GO, fill = GO),
             #alpha = 0.5, 
             colour = "black", shape = 21) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = rev(pal),
    name = "GFoffset") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "grey30",
              fill = "grey30", alpha = 0.2) +
  ylab(expression(GF[offset])) + xlab("Elevation (m)") +
  facet_wrap(~Species) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", angle = 90,
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "black", size = 18),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 18),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.text.position = "bottom",
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(size = "none",
         fill = guide_colorbar(
           title = expression(GF[offset]),
           label.position = "bottom",
           title.position = "left",
           title.vjust = 0.8,
           frame.colour = "black",
           barwidth = 10,
           barheight = 1.5,
           ticks.colour = "grey30"))

EO.OF.VIF <- raster("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_3_DataAnalysis/gradientForest_Combined/BP_LF/EO/Genetic_Offset/vif/EO.gen.off.vif.tif")

#Map----

##Scaled---- 
#Convert to spatraster
BM.OF.VIF.spat <- rast(BM.OF.VIF)
CR.OF.VIF.spat <- rast(CR.OF.VIF)
EI.OF.VIF.spat <- rast(EI.OF.VIF)
EO.OF.VIF.spat <- rast(EO.OF.VIF)
GA.OF.VIF.spat <- rast(GA.OF.VIF)
XA.OF.VIF.spat <- rast(XA.OF.VIF)

#Use the scale() function for SDs
BM.OF.VIF_scaled <- scale(BM.OF.VIF.spat)
CR.OF.VIF_scaled <- scale(CR.OF.VIF.spat)
EI.OF.VIF_scaled <- scale(EI.OF.VIF.spat)
EO.OF.VIF_scaled <- scale(EO.OF.VIF.spat)
GA.OF.VIF_scaled <- scale(GA.OF.VIF.spat)
XA.OF.VIF_scaled <- scale(XA.OF.VIF.spat)

# Add offset values together with mosaic merge in terra
Temp_comb.OF_scaled.vif <- mosaic(BM.OF.VIF_scaled, CR.OF.VIF_scaled, EI.OF.VIF_scaled, fun="sum")
Combined_offset_scaled.vif <- mosaic(Temp_comb.OF_scaled.vif, EO.OF.VIF_scaled, GA.OF.VIF_scaled, XA.OF.VIF_scaled, fun="sum")

coords.shp=st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Geo_coord_all_pops_Ch2.shp")

pal <- brewer.pal(n = 10, name = "RdYlBu")

Spp.coords.shp$Elevation <- factor(Spp.coords.shp$Elevation, levels = c("High", "Low"))

  geom_spatraster(data = Combined_offset_scaled.vif) +
  geom_sf(data = gnp, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.5) +

  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = rev(pal), na.value = "white") +  
  xlab("Longitude") +
  ylab("Latitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.text.position = "bottom",
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
    title = expression(GF[offset]~"(scaled)"),

    title.position = "left",
    title.vjust = 0.8,
    frame.colour = "black",

###Banksia----
BM.coords <- read.csv("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/BM/BM_coords_Ch2.csv")

#Load Elevation
ele <- rast("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Climate_Raster/GNP/Re_sized/Topography/Masked/elevation.tif")

#Extract Values from Raster
BM.ex.vif <- raster::extract(x = BM.OF.VIF, BM.coords[,c('lon','lat')])
BM.ex.vif <- data.frame(BM.ex.vif)

BM.ele.x <- raster::extract(x = ele, BM.coords[,c('lon','lat')])

BM.OF.VIF.ex <- cbind(BM.coords, BM.ele.x, BM.ex.vif)

head(BM.OF.VIF.ex)

write.csv(BM.OF.VIF.ex, file="BM_GO_Scatterplot_VIF.csv")

ggplot(BM.OF.VIF.ex, aes(x = ele, y = GO.VIF, color = GO.VIF)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colours = rev(pal)) +
  xlim(221, 1162) +
  ylim(0.01, 0.05) +
  ylab("GFoffset") +
  xlab("Elevation (m)") +
  theme_test() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.position="bottom", legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.text=element_text(size=10, face="plain"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black", 
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, 
                                   face = "plain", size=15,
                                   angle = 60),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black", size=15, face="plain")) +
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = ("GFoffset"),
                                label.position = "bottom",
                                title.position = "left", 
                                title.vjust = 0.8,
                                frame.colour = "black",
                                barwidth = 10,
                                barheight = 1.5,
                                label.theme = element_text(angle = 45,vjust = 0.5))) #+
#geom_label_repel(aes(label = Pop),
#                 color = "black", 
#                 fontface = "bold",
#                 segment.color = "grey30",
#                 segment.size = 1,
#                 min.segment.length = 0.1,
#                 na.rm = TRUE,
#                 show.legend = TRUE,
#                 max.overlaps = Inf) +
#guides(alpha = "none", size = "none")

ggsave("BM_GO_Scatterplot_VIF.pdf", height = 5, width = 5)

##Facet ~Species----

Spp_GO_Scatterplot_VIF <- read.csv("Spp_GO_Scatterplot_VIF.csv")

# Modify the factor levels (facet labels)
Spp_GO_Scatterplot_VIF$Species <- factor(Spp_GO_Scatterplot_VIF$Species, levels = c("BM","CR", "EI", "EO", "GA", "XA"), 
                                         labels = c("Banksia","Callitris","Epacris",
                                                    "Eucalyptus","Grevillea","Xanthorrhoea"))

ggplot(Spp_GO_Scatterplot_VIF, aes(ele, GO.VIF)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = GO.VIF, fill = GO.VIF),
             #alpha = 0.5, 
             colour = "black", shape = 21) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = rev(pal),
    name = "GFoffset") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "grey30",
              fill = "grey30", alpha = 0.2) +
  ylab(expression(GF[offset])) + xlab("Elevation (m)") +
  facet_wrap(~Species) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", angle = 90,
                                   vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "black", size = 18),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 18),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.text.position = "bottom",
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(size = "none",
         fill = guide_colorbar(
           title = expression(GF[offset]),
           label.position = "bottom",
           title.position = "left",
           title.vjust = 0.8,
           frame.colour = "black",
           barwidth = 10,
           barheight = 1.5,
           ticks.colour = "grey30")) 

ggsave(file = "Spp_GO_Scatterplot_2_VIF.pdf", width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```


```{r Procrustes residuals}
load("BM.PCA.RData")
load("CR.PCA.RData")
load("EI.PCA.RData")
load("EO.PCA.RData")
load("GA.PCA.RData")
load("XA.PCA.RData")

#Adaptive (seven env)----

#Extract the climate data for all the cells in the climate data layer and remove missing data.
load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Env.stack.2.RData")

#Convert rasters into data frames
Env.stack.2.df <- na.omit(extract(Env.stack.2, 1:ncell(Env.stack.2), df = TRUE))

#BMvsCR----
BM.CR.diff.procrustes = procrustes(BM.PCA, CR.PCA, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
BM.CR.resids = residuals(BM.CR.diff.procrustes)

summary(BM.CR.resids)
#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0002981 0.0024399 0.0030829 0.0034446 0.0039305 0.0117052 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
BM.CR.rastProc <- Env.stack.2$BIO01  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
BM.CR.rastProc[BM.CR.rastProc != 0] <- 0.0117052

#Assign residuals to raster cells
BM.CR.rastProc[Env.stack.2.df$ID] <- BM.CR.resids  

##Map the results----
pdf("BM.CR.ProcrustesMap.pdf")
plot(BM.CR.rastProc, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="B. marginata vs. C. rhomboidea",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

tmap_mode("plot")
BM.CR.rastProc.2 <-
  tm_shape(BM.CR.rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdGy", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 22,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(CR.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "B. marginata vs. C. rhomboidea", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(BM.CR.rastProc.2, filename = "BM.CR.ProcrustesMap_2.pdf")

#BMvsEI----
BM.EI.diff.procrustes = procrustes(BM.PCA, EI.PCA, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
BM.EI.resids = residuals(BM.EI.diff.procrustes)

summary(BM.EI.resids)
#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0003635 0.0039244 0.0049019 0.0054283 0.0065547 0.0289451

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
BM.EI.rastProc <- Env.stack.2$BIO01  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
BM.EI.rastProc[BM.EI.rastProc != 0] <- 0.0289451

#Assign residuals to raster cells
BM.EI.rastProc[Env.stack.2.df$ID] <- BM.EI.resids  

##Map the results----
pdf("BM.EI.procrustesMap.pdf")
plot(BM.EI.rastProc, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="B. marginata vs. E. impressa",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

tmap_mode("plot")
BM.EI.rastProc.2 <-
  tm_shape(BM.EI.rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdGy", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 22,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "B. marginata vs. E. impressa", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(BM.EI.rastProc.2, filename = "BM.EI.ProcrustesMap_2.pdf")

#BMvsEO----
BM.EO.diff.procrustes = procrustes(BM.PCA, EO.PCA, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
BM.EO.resids = residuals(BM.EO.diff.procrustes)

summary(BM.EO.resids)
#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0003334 0.0043174 0.0053430 0.0058969 0.0070966 0.0282773 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
BM.EO.rastProc <- Env.stack.2$BIO01  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
BM.EO.rastProc[BM.EO.rastProc != 0] <- 0.0282773

#Assign residuals to raster cells
BM.EO.rastProc[Env.stack.2.df$ID] <- BM.EO.resids  

##Map the results----
pdf("BM.EO.procrustesMap.pdf")
plot(BM.EO.rastProc, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="B. marginata vs. E. obliqua",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

tmap_mode("plot")
BM.EO.rastProc.2 <-
  tm_shape(BM.EO.rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdGy", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 22,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(EO.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 23,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,

#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max.

  tm_shape(BM.GA.rastProc)+

            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 22,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+

             shapes = 21,

             col = "black",

             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "B. marginata vs. G. aquifolium", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(EO.GA.rastProc.2, filename = "EO.GA.ProcrustesMap_2.pdf")

#EOvsXA----
EO.XA.diff.procrustes = procrustes(EO.PCA, XA.PCA, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
EO.XA.resids = residuals(EO.XA.diff.procrustes)

summary(EO.XA.resids)
#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0006007 0.0045487 0.0061409 0.0075851 0.0090887 0.0322057 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
EO.XA.rastProc <- Env.stack.2$BIO01  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
EO.XA.rastProc[EO.XA.rastProc != 0] <- 0.0322057

#Assign residuals to raster cells
EO.XA.rastProc[Env.stack.2.df$ID] <- EO.XA.resids  

##Map the results----
pdf("EO.XA.procrustesMap.pdf")
plot(EO.XA.rastProc, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="E. obliqua vs. X. australis",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

EO.XA.rastProc.2 <- tm_shape(EO.XA.rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdGy", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(EO.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 23,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(XA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "G. aquifolium vs. X. australis", title.size = 0.4,

            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

#PLot procrustes residuals across species----

rastProc <- stack(BM.XA.rastProc, BM.CR.rastProc, BM.GA.rastProc, CR.XA.rastProc, EI.EO.rastProc, 
                  GA.XA.rastProc, CR.GA.rastProc, BM.EO.rastProc, BM.EI.rastProc, CR.EO.rastProc, 
                  CR.EI.rastProc, EO.XA.rastProc, EI.XA.rastProc, EI.GA.rastProc, EO.GA.rastProc)

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

tmap_mode("plot")
rastProc.spp <- 
  tm_shape(rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdBu", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) + 
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            #main.title = "Procrustes residuals: Difference in mapped spatial patten", title.size = 1, 
            title.position = c("right", "top"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05),
            panel.labels = c("BM. vs. XA","BM. vs. CR","BM. vs. GA","CR. vs. XA","EI. vs. EO", 
                             "GA. vs. XA","CR. vs. GA","BM. vs. EO","BM. vs. EI","CR. vs. EO", 
                             "CR. vs. EI","EO. vs. XA","EI. vs. XA","EI. vs. GA","EO. vs. GA")) 
  
tmap_save(rastProc.spp, filename = "Procrustes_map_spp_2.pdf")

#Interactive map
tmap_mode("plot")
rastProc.spp <-
  tm_shape(rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= get_brewer_pal("-RdYlGn", n=10, plot=FALSE),
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +

tmap_save(rastProc.spp, filename = "Procrustes_map_spp_3.pdf")

#Adaptive (four env)----
load("BM.PCA.vif.RData")
load("CR.PCA.vif.RData")
load("EI.PCA.vif.RData")
load("EO.PCA.vif.RData")
load("GA.PCA.vif.RData")
load("XA.PCA.vif.RData")

#Extract the climate data for all the cells in the climate data layer and remove missing data.
load("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/2_Chapter/2_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Map/Env.stack.3.RData")

#Convert rasters into data frames
Env.stack.3.df <- na.omit(extract(Env.stack.3, 1:ncell(Env.stack.3), df = TRUE))

#BMvsCR----
BM.CR.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(BM.PCA.vif, CR.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
BM.CR.resids.vif = residuals(BM.CR.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(BM.CR.resids.vif)
#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0001233 0.0036727 0.0048186 0.0051123 0.0063271 0.0249443 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
BM.CR.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
BM.CR.rastProc.vif[BM.CR.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 0.0249443  

#Assign residuals to raster cells
BM.CR.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- BM.CR.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("BM.CR.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(BM.CR.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="BM vs. CR",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

tmap_mode("plot")
BM.CR.rastProc.vif.2 <-
  tm_shape(BM.CR.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(BM.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 22,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(CR.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "BM vs. CR", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(BM.CR.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "BM.CR.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

  tm_shape(CR.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "CR vs. EI", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(CR.EI.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "CR.EI.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#PLot procrustes residuals across species----

rastProc <- stack(CR.XA.rastProc.vif, BM.GA.rastProc.vif, EO.XA.rastProc.vif, CR.EO.rastProc.vif, BM.CR.rastProc.vif, 
                  BM.XA.rastProc.vif, EI.XA.rastProc.vif, EI.EO.rastProc.vif, CR.EI.rastProc.vif, GA.XA.rastProc.vif, 
                  CR.GA.rastProc.vif, BM.EO.rastProc.vif, BM.EI.rastProc.vif, EO.GA.rastProc.vif, EI.GA.rastProc.vif)

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

tmap_mode("plot")
rastProc.spp <- 
  tm_shape(rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdBu",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) + 
  #tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_facets(ncol=5, free.scales = FALSE) +
  #tm_facets(ncol=5) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            #main.title = "Procrustes residuals: Difference in mapped spatial patten", title.size = 1, 
            title.position = c("right", "top"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05),
            panel.labels = c("CA. vs. XA","BA. vs. GR","EU. vs. XA","CA. vs. EU","BA. vs. CA", 
                             "BA. vs. XA","EP. vs. XA","EP. vs. EU","CA. vs. EP","GR. vs. XA", 
                             "CA. vs. GR","BA. vs. EU","BA. vs. EP","EU. vs. GR","EP. vs. GR")) 

tmap_save(rastProc.spp, filename = "Procrustes_map_spp_vif_2_scaled.pdf")
#tmap_save(rastProc.spp, filename = "Procrustes_map_spp_vif_2.pdf")
```
